config/urls.py
Check karo ye line hai ya nahi:

from django.urls import path, include

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    path('students/', include('students.urls')),
    path('faculty/', include('faculty.urls')),
]
Agar ye missing hai to add karo.

3️⃣ Faculty Views (Complete)
faculty/views.py

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from .models import Faculty
from .forms import FacultyForm


# LIST
def faculty_list(request):
    faculties = Faculty.objects.all()
    return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})


# ADD
def add_faculty(request):

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect('faculty_list')

    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, 'faculties/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})


# EDIT
def edit_faculty(request, id):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=id)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, instance=faculty)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect('faculty_list')

    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, 'faculties/edit_faculty.html', {'form': form})


# DELETE
def delete_faculty(request, id):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=id)
    faculty.delete()

    return redirect('faculty_list')


# PROFILE
def faculty_profile(request, id):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=id)

    return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_profile.html', {'faculty': faculty})
4️⃣ Templates Structure (Very Important)
templates
   |
   |--- faculties
           |
           |--- add_faculty.html
           |--- faculty_list.html
           |--- edit_faculty.html
           |--- faculty_profile.html

Bahut accha progress hai 👍
Tumhara Faculty module 90% sahi chal raha hai. Jo error aa raha hai wo bahut common Django mistake hai.

Error ye hai 👇

TypeError: faculty_profile() got an unexpected keyword argument 'pk'
Iska matlab:

👉 URL me pk use ho raha hai
lekin
👉 view function id expect kar raha hai

Isliye Django confuse ho raha hai.

✅ Solution (2 minute fix)
1️⃣ faculty/views.py open karo
Abhi tumhara code kuch aisa hoga:

def faculty_profile(request, id):
Isko change karke pk kar do.

Correct code:
def faculty_profile(request, pk):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=pk)

    return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_profile.html', {'faculty': faculty})
2️⃣ Edit View fix karo
def edit_faculty(request, pk):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, instance=faculty)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect('faculty_list')

    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, 'faculties/edit_faculty.html', {'form': form})
3️⃣ Delete View fix karo
def delete_faculty(request, pk):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=pk)

    faculty.delete()

    return redirect('faculty_list')

🔥 Step 1 — Faculty Model Update
Open karo:

faculty/models.py
Aur isko update karo:

from django.db import models
from departments.models import Department

class Faculty(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    email = models.EmailField()
    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15)

    department = models.ForeignKey(
        Department,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="faculties"
    )

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Samjho kya hua
department = ForeignKey
Iska matlab:

1 Department → Many Faculty
Example:

CSE
 ├── Rahul
 ├── Aman
 └── Priya

Terminal me run karo:

python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
🔥 Step 3 — Faculty Form Update
Open karo:

faculty/forms.py
Update karo:

from django import forms
from .models import Faculty

class FacultyForm(forms.ModelForm):

    class Meta:
        model = Faculty
        fields = ['name', 'email', 'phone', 'department']
Ab department dropdown show hoga.

🔥 Step 1 — View Update
Open karo:

faculty/views.py
Aur ye function add / update karo:

from django.shortcuts import render, get_object_or_404
from .models import Faculty


def faculty_profile(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    return render(
        request,
        "faculty/faculty_profile.html",
        {"faculty": faculty}
    )
🔥 Step 2 — URL Add
Open karo:

faculty/urls.py
Add karo:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [

    path("", views.faculty_list, name="faculty_list"),

    path("add/", views.add_faculty, name="add_faculty"),

    path("profile/<int:pk>/", views.faculty_profile, name="faculty_profile"),

]
🔥 Step 3 — Profile Template
Create file:

templates/faculty/faculty_profile.html

Prateek 👍 error clear hai.
Problem template folder ke naam ki wajah se aa rahi hai.

Error line dekho:

TemplateDoesNotExist: faculties/faculty_profile.html
Matlab Django faculties folder me template dhund raha hai.

Lekin humne template banaya hai:

templates/faculty/faculty_profile.html
Yaha faculty (singular) hai, faculties (plural) nahi.

✅ Fix (2 tarike hain)
✔ Fix 1 (Best Method)
Open karo:

faculty/views.py
Ye line change karo:

return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_profile.html', {'faculty': faculty})
Replace with:

return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_profile.html', {'faculty': faculty})
✔ Fix 2 (Alternative)
Agar tum change nahi karna chahte to folder rename karo:

templates
   └── faculties
        └── faculty_profile.html
Lekin industry practice hai:

templates/faculty/
Isliye Fix 1 best hai.

📁 Final Folder Structure (Important)
Check karo ki tumhare project me ye structure ho:

college_erp
│
├── faculty
│
├── templates
│     └── faculty
│            ├── faculty_list.html
│            ├── add_faculty.html
│            └── faculty_profile.html
🔄 Ab kya karo
1️⃣ code fix karo
2️⃣ server already running hai
3️⃣ browser refresh karo

http://127.0.0.1:8000/faculty/profile/1/

templates/faculty/add_faculty.html
Isliye error aa raha hai.

✅ Fix (2 minute ka kaam)
Open karo:

faculty/views.py
Line 25 par tumhe aisa milega:

return render(request, 'faculties/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})
Usko change karo:

return render(request, 'faculty/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})
🧠 Important Rule (Django Template)
Template path =

templates / app_name / file.html
Tumhara case:

templates
   └── faculty
        ├── add_faculty.html
        ├── faculty_list.html
        └── faculty_profile.html
Toh views me faculty/ hi likhna hoga.

🔧 Better Fix (Professional)
views.py me sab jagah check karo kahin bhi faculties/ na ho.

Example correct code:

return render(request, 'faculty/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})
return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_profile.html', {'faculty': faculty})
🚀 Ab kya karo
1️⃣ views.py fix karo
2️⃣ save karo
3️⃣ browser refresh karo

http://127.0.0.1:8000/faculty/add/

1️⃣ Faculty Search Feature
Step 1 — faculty/views.py
Faculty list view ko update karo.

from django.shortcuts import render
from .models import Faculty
from django.db.models import Q

def faculty_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        faculties = Faculty.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(email__icontains=query) |
            Q(department__icontains=query)
        )
    else:
        faculties = Faculty.objects.all()

    return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
Step 2 — faculty_list.html me search box
Table ke upar ye add karo:

<form method="GET">
    <input type="text" name="q" placeholder="Search Faculty">
    <button type="submit">Search</button>
</form>
Ab tum search kar paoge:

name
email
department
2️⃣ Pagination (Large Faculty List Handle Karne ke liye)
Step 1 — views.py
from django.core.paginator import Paginator

def faculty_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        faculty_list = Faculty.objects.filter(name__icontains=query)
    else:
        faculty_list = Faculty.objects.all()

    paginator = Paginator(faculty_list, 5)  # 5 faculty per page
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    faculties = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
Step 2 — faculty_list.html bottom me pagination
<div>
    {% if faculties.has_previous %}
        <a href="?page=1">First</a>
        <a href="?page={{ faculties.previous_page_number }}">Previous</a>
    {% endif %}

    Page {{ faculties.number }} of {{ faculties.paginator.num_pages }}

    {% if faculties.has_next %}
        <a href="?page={{ faculties.next_page_number }}">Next</a>
        <a href="?page={{ faculties.paginator.num_pages }}">Last</a>
    {% endif %}
</div>

Error ka reason simple hai 👍
Tumne settings.py me os import nahi kiya, isliye Django ko os.path.join() samajh nahi aa raha.

Error line:

NameError: name 'os' is not defined
✅ Fix (2 seconds ka solution)
config/settings.py open karo
Top me imports me ye line add karo:

import os
Example:

from pathlib import Path
import os
Fir niche ye lines rehni chahiye:
MEDIA_URL = '/media/'
MEDIA_ROOT = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, 'media')
🚀 Ab dubara commands run karo
python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
Phir server run karo

python manage.py runserver

Error ka reason clear hai 👍

NameError: name 'Paginator' is not defined
Matlab tum Pagination use kar rahe ho lekin Paginator import nahi kiya.

✅ Fix (1 line add karni hai)
File open karo
faculty/views.py
File ke top me imports me ye line add karo:

from django.core.paginator import Paginator
Example tumhara views.py kuch aisa hona chahiye
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect
from .models import Faculty
from .forms import FacultyForm
from django.core.paginator import Paginator


def faculty_list(request):
    faculty_list = Faculty.objects.all()

    paginator = Paginator(faculty_list, 5)  # 5 faculty per page
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    page_obj = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'page_obj': page_obj})

django.template.exceptions.TemplateDoesNotExist: faculties/faculty_list.html
[06/Mar/2026 13:02:24] "GET /faculty/ HTTP/1.1" 500 87447

Ab issue 2 jagah hai, aur dono clear dikh rahe hain.

1. Main error
Tumhare faculty/views.py me abhi ye hai:

return render(request, 'faculties/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
Lekin tumhare templates folder ka naam faculty hai, faculties nahi.

Is line ko change karo:
return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
2. Pagination warning
Ye warning hai, fatal error nahi:

UnorderedObjectListWarning
Isko fix karne ke liye queryset ko order karo.

faculty/views.py me faculty_list ko is code se replace kar do:
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from .models import Faculty
from .forms import FacultyForm


def faculty_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.filter(name__icontains=query).order_by('id')
    else:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(faculty_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    faculties = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})
3. Folder structure exactly aisa hona chahiye
templates/
    faculty/
        add_faculty.html
        faculty_list.html
        edit_faculty.html
        faculty_profile.html
4. Ek aur important baat
Agar template me loop aisa hai:

{% for faculty in faculties %}
to upar wala view sahi hai.

Agar template me page_obj use kiya hai, to mujhe bata dena, kyunki phir context key change karni padegi.

5. Ab kya karo
Save karo, phir server refresh karo. Zarurat pade to:

python manage.py runserver
Phir open karo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/faculty/
Iske baad list page chal jana chahiye.
Uske baad hum edit, delete, search, pagination sab final polish kar denge.

Great 👍 Ab Faculty Module ko professional finish karte hain. Step-by-step karenge taaki kuch break na ho.

STEP 1 — Faculty Photo Upload (Model)
Open karo:

faculty/models.py
Model ko aisa bana do (agar photo field nahi hai):

from django.db import models

class Faculty(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    email = models.EmailField()
    department = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    date_joined = models.DateField()

    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='faculty_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
STEP 2 — Pillow install karo (Image upload ke liye)
Terminal me run karo:

pip install pillow

MEDIA_ROOT = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, 'media')

Open:

config/urls.py
Bottom me add karo:

from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static

urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)

Terminal:

python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate

Open:

faculty/forms.py
from django import forms
from .models import Faculty

class FacultyForm(forms.ModelForm):

    class Meta:
        model = Faculty
        fields = "__all__"
STEP 7 — Add Faculty view update
Open:

faculty/views.py
def add_faculty(request):

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("faculty_list")

    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, "faculty/add_faculty.html", {"form": form})

list m faculty ka photo show nii ho rha h 

Photo show nahi ho raha kyunki usually in 4 me se koi ek cheez missing hoti hai. Tumhare screenshot se sabse likely issue ye hai ki photo database me save hi nahi ho rahi.

Sabse pehle ye 4 cheezein exactly check karo
1) add_faculty.html me form aisa hona chahiye
<form method="POST" enctype="multipart/form-data">
    {% csrf_token %}
    {{ form.as_p }}
    <button type="submit">Add Faculty</button>
</form>
Agar enctype="multipart/form-data" nahi hoga to image upload nahi hogi.

2) faculty/views.py me request.FILES hona chahiye
add_faculty function:

def add_faculty(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("faculty_list")
    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, "faculty/add_faculty.html", {"form": form})
Aur edit_faculty me bhi:

def edit_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("faculty_list")
    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, "faculty/edit_faculty.html", {"form": form})
3) settings.py me media config sahi honi chahiye
from pathlib import Path
import os

BASE_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent

MEDIA_URL = '/media/'
MEDIA_ROOT = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, 'media')
4) config/urls.py me media serve hona chahiye
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),
    path('students/', include('students.urls')),
    path('faculty/', include('faculty.urls')),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)

Good 👍 tum almost sahi jagah pahunch gaye ho. Error sirf Python indentation ka hai, project ka nahi.

Shell me tumne ye likha:

for f in Faculty.objects.all():
print(f.name, f.photo)
Python me for ke baad indentation (space) zaroori hota hai.

Correct code shell me aise likho
from faculty.models import Faculty

for f in Faculty.objects.all():
    print(f.name, f.photo)
Important:
print ke aage 4 spaces hone chahiye.

def edit_faculty(request, pk):

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("faculty_list")

STEP 1 — Messages enable karo
faculty/views.py
Imports me add karo:

from django.contrib import messages
Phir views update karo:

def add_faculty(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty added successfully.")
            return redirect("faculty_list")
    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, "faculty/add_faculty.html", {"form": form})
def edit_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty updated successfully.")
            return redirect("faculty_list")
    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, "faculty/edit_faculty.html", {"form": form})
def delete_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        faculty.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Faculty deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_list")

    return render(request, "faculty/delete_faculty.html", {"faculty": faculty})
STEP 2 — Faculty list page me messages show karo
templates/faculty/faculty_list.html
Top me add karo:

{% if messages %}
    {% for message in messages %}
        <p style="color: green;">{{ message }}</p>
    {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
STEP 3 — Delete confirmation page banao
templates/faculty/delete_faculty.html
<h2>Delete Faculty</h2>

<p>Are you sure you want to delete <b>{{ faculty.name }}</b>?</p>

<form method="POST">
    {% csrf_token %}
    <button type="submit">Yes, Delete</button>
</form>

<a href="/faculty/">Cancel</a>
STEP 4 — Faculty list me delete link update karo
faculty_list.html me delete link aisa rakho:

<a href="/faculty/delete/{{ faculty.id }}/">Delete</a>

templates/base.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

    <title>College ERP</title>

    <!-- Bootstrap CSS -->
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

</head>

<body>

<!-- NAVBAR -->

<nav class="navbar navbar-dark bg-dark navbar-expand-lg">
    <div class="container">

        <a class="navbar-brand" href="/">College ERP</a>

        <div class="navbar-nav">

            <a class="nav-link" href="/students/">Students</a>
            <a class="nav-link" href="/faculty/">Faculty</a>
            <a class="nav-link" href="/courses/">Courses</a>
            <a class="nav-link" href="/admin/">Admin</a>

        </div>

    </div>
</nav>


<div class="container mt-4">

    {% block content %}

    {% endblock %}

</div>

</body>
</html>

<th>Department</th>
<th>Actions</th>

<img src="{{ faculty.photo.url }}" width="60">
{% else %}
No Photo
{% endif %}
</td>

<td>{{ faculty.name }}</td>
<td>{{ faculty.email }}</td>
<td>{{ faculty.department }}</td>

<td>

<a href="/faculty/profile/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>

<a href="/faculty/edit/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>

</td>

</tr>

STEP 3 — Add Faculty UI upgrade
Open:

templates/faculty/add_faculty.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

ye base.html faculty k andr h ..?

Nahi ❌
base.html faculty folder ke andar nahi hona chahiye.

ERP project me base template global hota hai, taaki students, faculty, courses, exams sab usko reuse kar saken.

Correct location
base.html ko global templates folder me rakhna hai.

Tumhare project structure ke hisaab se:

college_erp
│
├── templates
│      base.html   ✅ yaha hona chahiye
│
├── faculty
│      templates
│           faculty
│                faculty_list.html
│                add_faculty.html
│                edit_faculty.html
│                faculty_profile.html
│
├── students
│
├── courses
Matlab final structure
templates
     base.html

templates/faculty
     faculty_list.html
     add_faculty.html
     edit_faculty.html
     faculty_profile.html
Faculty template me kaise use karoge
Example:

{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<h2>Faculty List</h2>

{% endblock %}
Important check
settings.py me ye hona chahiye:

TEMPLATES = [
{
    'DIRS': [BASE_DIR / 'templates'],
}
]
Taaki Django global templates folder detect kar sake.

Short rule
Template	Location
base.html	templates/
faculty pages	templates/faculty/
student pages	templates/students/
course pages	templates/courses/
Agar chaho to main tumhe proper final ERP project folder architecture bhi dikha sakta hoon jo industry style hota hai.
Usse tumhara project 10x clean aur scalable ho jayega.

Replace karo templates/faculty/faculty_list.html with this
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

{% if messages %}
    {% for message in messages %}
        <div class="alert alert-success" role="alert">
            {{ message }}
        </div>
    {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
    <h2 class="mb-0">Faculty List</h2>
    <a href="/faculty/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Faculty</a>
</div>

<form method="GET" class="row g-2 mb-3">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search Faculty" value="{{ request.GET.q }}">
    </div>
    <div class="col-auto">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark">Search</button>
    </div>
</form>

<div class="table-responsive">
    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped align-middle">
        <thead class="table-dark">
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>Photo</th>
                <th>Name</th>
                <th>Email</th>
                <th>Department</th>
                <th>Actions</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>

        {% for faculty in faculties %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ faculty.id }}</td>

                <td>
                    {% if faculty.photo %}
                        <img src="{{ faculty.photo.url }}" width="60" height="60" alt="Faculty Photo" class="rounded">
                    {% else %}
                        <span class="text-muted">No Photo</span>
                    {% endif %}
                </td>

                <td>{{ faculty.name }}</td>
                <td>{{ faculty.email }}</td>
                <td>{{ faculty.department }}</td>

                <td>
                    <a href="/faculty/profile/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                    <a href="/faculty/edit/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                    <a href="/faculty/delete/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                </td>
            </tr>
        {% empty %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="6" class="text-center">No faculty found.</td>
            </tr>
        {% endfor %}

        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>

<nav>
    <ul class="pagination">
        {% if faculties.has_previous %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">First</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ faculties.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Previous</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}

        <li class="page-item disabled">
            <span class="page-link">Page {{ faculties.number }} of {{ faculties.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
        </li>

        {% if faculties.has_next %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ faculties.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Next</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ faculties.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Last</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}
    </ul>
</nav>

{% endblock %}

Faculty module me abhi jo verify / complete karna baaki hai
Ye final checklist hai. In sab ka answer Yes ho jaye to faculty module complete maan lo:

1. Add Faculty fully working?
Check:

form open ho raha hai

new faculty save ho rahi hai

photo bhi save ho rahi hai

department save ho raha hai

2. Faculty List fully working?
Check:

list page open ho raha hai

photo show ho rahi hai

search kaam kar raha hai

pagination kaam kar rahi hai

3. Faculty Profile fully working?
Check:

profile page open ho raha hai

name, email, phone, department, date joined show ho raha hai

photo show ho rahi hai

4. Edit Faculty fully working?
Check:

edit page open ho raha hai

old data prefilled aa raha hai

update ke baad list/profile me new data dikh raha hai

new photo update ho rahi hai

5. Delete Faculty fully working?
Check:

delete confirmation page open ho rahi hai

confirm karne pe faculty delete ho rahi hai

cancel se wapas list pe ja raha hai

6. Success messages working?
Check:

add ke baad success message

edit ke baad success message

delete ke baad success message

7. Department relation properly working?
Check:

add/edit form me department dropdown aa raha hai

list me department show ho raha hai

profile me department show ho raha hai

Mere hisaab se abhi likely kya bacha hai
Functional side se faculty module mostly complete lag raha hai.
Ab jo cheezein bachi hongi, wo usually ye hoti hain:

Edit faculty page ko final test karna

Delete confirmation flow test karna

Messages visibly show ho rahe hain ya nahi check karna

Department dropdown aur save test karna

Photo update on edit test karna

Final definition
Faculty module tab 100% complete maanenge jab ye 5 flows test ho jayein:

Add

List

Profile

Edit

Delete

Aur inke saath:

search

pagination

photo

messages

department relation

bhi work karein.

courses/models.py

from django.db import models

class Course(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)

    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)

    department = models.CharField(max_length=100)

    duration = models.IntegerField()

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Phir run karo

python manage.py migrate

(venv) PS C:\Users\lenovo\college_erp> python manage.py makemigrations 
>> python manage.py migrate
Was course.credits renamed to course.duration (a IntegerField)? [y/N] 

Ye Django ka migration question hai. Django detect kar raha hai ki tumne model me field rename ki hai.

Message:

Was course.credits renamed to course.duration (a IntegerField)? [y/N]
Matlab:

Pehle model me field thi:

credits
Aur ab tumne change karke likh diya:

duration
Django pooch raha hai:

👉 kya credits field ko rename karke duration banaya hai?

Kya select karna hai
Agar sach me tumne credits ko duration me rename kiya hai, to type karo:

y
phir enter.

Phir migrate run ho jayega.

Agar tumne credits field delete karke new duration add ki hai
to type karo:

N
lekin best option y hi hai kyunki data safe rehta hai.

Tumhare case me
Course model ab aisa hai:

class Course(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    department = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    duration = models.IntegerField()
Isliye:

👉 type karo y

Was course.credits renamed to course.duration (a IntegerField)? [y/N] y

It is impossible to add a non-nullable field 'code' to course without specifying a default. This is because the database needs something to populate existing rows.
Please select a fix:
 1) Provide a one-off default now (will be set on all existing rows with a null value for this column)
 2) Quit and manually define a default value in models.py.
Select an option:

Django ka message bilkul normal hai 👍
Issue ye hai:

Tumne Course model me new field code add ki hai, aur database me already old rows hain.
Isliye Django pooch raha hai: existing rows me code kya value dale?

Message:

It is impossible to add a non-nullable field 'code'
Matlab:

code field blank nahi ho sakti, lekin purane records me value nahi hai.

phir Enter.

nhi hua 

Thik hai — prompt me atak gaye ho. Isko clean tareeke se fix karte hain.

Abhi kya hua
Django migration prompt me valid Python value mang raha hai.
String dene ke liye quotes chahiye hote hain, warna NameError aata hai.

Lekin ab easiest way ye hai ki prompt se bahar niklo aur model me temporary defaults daal do.

Ab karo ye
1. Prompt se bahar niklo
Jahan >>> aa raha hai, waha likho:

exit
phir Enter.

2. courses/models.py open karo
Abhi jo nayi fields add ki hain, unme temporary defaults daal do:

from django.db import models

class Course(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20, default="TEMP")
    department = models.CharField(max_length=100, default="GENERAL")
    duration = models.IntegerField(default=3)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Agar duration already hai to usme bhi default de do, taaki aur prompt na aaye.

3. Phir dubara commands chalao

python manage.py migrate

Step 1 — courses/forms.py
from django import forms
from .models import Course

class CourseForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Course
        fields = "__all__"
Step 2 — courses/views.py
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from .models import Course
from .forms import CourseForm
from django.contrib import messages


def course_list(request):
    courses = Course.objects.all().order_by("id")
    return render(request, "courses/course_list.html", {"courses": courses})


def add_course(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = CourseForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Course added successfully.")
            return redirect("course_list")
    else:
        form = CourseForm()

    return render(request, "courses/add_course.html", {"form": form})


def edit_course(request, pk):
    course = get_object_or_404(Course, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = CourseForm(request.POST, instance=course)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Course updated successfully.")
            return redirect("course_list")
    else:
        form = CourseForm(instance=course)

    return render(request, "courses/edit_course.html", {"form": form})


def delete_course(request, pk):
    course = get_object_or_404(Course, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        course.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Course deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("course_list")

    return render(request, "courses/delete_course.html", {"course": course})


def course_profile(request, pk):
    course = get_object_or_404(Course, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "courses/course_profile.html", {"course": course})
Step 3 — courses/urls.py
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path("", views.course_list, name="course_list"),
    path("add/", views.add_course, name="add_course"),
    path("edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_course, name="edit_course"),
    path("delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_course, name="delete_course"),
    path("profile/<int:pk>/", views.course_profile, name="course_profile"),
]
Step 4 — config/urls.py me include karo
path('courses/', include('courses.urls')),
Agar include import nahi hai to:

from django.urls import path, include

Subject model example:

class Subject(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)

    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)

    course = models.ForeignKey(Course, on_delete=models.CASCADE)

    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.CASCADE)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name

m jb kisi faculty ko delete krta hu to uske baad confirmation box nhi aaata h direct delete kr deta h 

Ye isliye ho raha hai kyunki tumhara delete_faculty view GET request par hi delete kar raha hai.
Confirmation box/tab page tab aata hai jab pehle GET par confirmation template render ho, aur delete sirf POST par ho.

Sahi flow
/faculty/delete/1/ open karo → confirmation page aaye

“Yes, Delete” dabao → POST ho aur record delete ho

1) faculty/views.py me delete_faculty aisa karo
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from .models import Faculty

def delete_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        faculty.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Faculty deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_list")

    return render(request, "faculty/delete_faculty.html", {"faculty": faculty})
Agar tumhare URL me id use ho raha hai pk ki jagah, to function bhi id le:

def delete_faculty(request, id):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, id=id)

    if request.method == "POST":
        faculty.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Faculty deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_list")

    return render(request, "faculty/delete_faculty.html", {"faculty": faculty})
Rule: URL aur view ka parameter same hona chahiye.

2) faculty/urls.py check karo
Agar pk use kar rahe ho:

path("delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_faculty, name="delete_faculty"),
Ya agar id use kar rahe ho:

path("delete/<int:id>/", views.delete_faculty, name="delete_faculty"),
3) templates/faculty/delete_faculty.html banao / check karo
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<div class="row justify-content-center">
    <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="card shadow border-danger">
            <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
                <h4 class="mb-0">Delete Faculty</h4>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body text-center">
                <p>Are you sure you want to delete <strong>{{ faculty.name }}</strong>?</p>

                <form method="POST">
                    {% csrf_token %}
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">Yes, Delete</button>
                    <a href="/faculty/" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}
4) faculty_list.html me delete link sirf page khole
<a href="/faculty/delete/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
Yahaan form mat lagao, bas link rehne do.
Link click karne par confirmation page khulega.

5) Agar abhi bhi direct delete ho raha hai
To almost pakka tumhare current delete_faculty view me ye type code hoga:

def delete_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    faculty.delete()
    return redirect("faculty_list")
Isko hata ke upar wala POST-check version lagao.

Jab ye ho jaye, next step me hum Course module ko faculty aur department se smarter relation denge

Haan, ab exactly wahi next smart step hai.
Ab Course module ko sirf text fields se nikaal ke real relations par le jaana chahiye.

Abhi likely kya hai
Course model me shayad:

name

code

department as text

duration

Ye working hai, but ERP-level nahi.

Ab Course ko smarter kaise banayenge
Step 1: Course ko Department se link karo
courses/models.py me department ko CharField rakhne ke bajay ForeignKey banao.

from django.db import models
from departments.models import Department

class Course(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    department = models.ForeignKey(Department, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    duration = models.IntegerField()

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Isse:

same department names repeat nahi honge

dropdown milega

proper relation banega

Step 2: Course ko Faculty se link karo
Agar ek course ka coordinator/class incharge faculty ho sakta hai, to ye add karo:

from faculty.models import Faculty

class Course(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    department = models.ForeignKey(Department, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    duration = models.IntegerField()
    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
SET_NULL isliye:

faculty delete ho jaye to course delete na ho

Step 3: Migration run karo
python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
Agar old data ki wajah se prompt aaye, to batana — usko clean way me handle karenge.

courses/forms.py

from django import forms
from .models import Course

class CourseForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Course
        fields = "__all__"

department dropdown

dono aayenge.

django.db.utils.IntegrityError: The row in table 'courses_course' with primary key '1' has an invalid foreign key: courses_course.department_id contains a value 'BTECH' that does not have a corresponding value in departments_department.id.
(venv) PS C:\Users\lenovo\college_erp> 

Issue clear hai: tumne Course.department ko text se ForeignKey(Department) bana diya, lekin database me purane rows me department me text values stored hain, jaise BTECH. Ab Django unhe departments_department.id samajh raha hai, isliye migration fail ho rahi hai.

Error ka meaning
Ye line sab bata rahi hai:

courses_course.department_id contains a value 'BTECH' that does not have a corresponding value in departments_department.id
Matlab:

courses_course table me purana data: department = "BTECH"

new model ke hisaab se department ko integer FK id chahiye

but "BTECH" koi Department.id nahi hai

Best fix abhi
Kyuki project dev stage me hai, easiest safe fix ye hai:

Step 1: courses/models.py me department ko temporarily nullable rakho
from django.db import models
from departments.models import Department
from faculty.models import Faculty

class Course(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    department = models.ForeignKey(Department, on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True)
    duration = models.IntegerField()
    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Step 2: problematic old course rows ko delete ya fix karo
Sabse simple:
Admin me jaake old courses delete kar do, ya shell se.

Shell method
python manage.py shell
Phir:

from courses.models import Course
Course.objects.all().delete()
exit()
Step 3: migration table state fix karo
Ab dobara run karo:

python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
Step 4: departments pehle create karo
Admin me jao aur departments add karo:

CSE

IT

BTECH

BCA

Step 5: fir naya course add karo
Ab jab course add karoge to department dropdown se select hoga, text nahi.

Agar old course data preserve karna hai
Tab thoda proper conversion karna padega:

departments_department table me matching department rows create karo

old course rows me "BTECH" ko us department ki id se map karo

phir migrate complete karo

But tumhare current stage pe ye unnecessary hai.

Mere hisaab se abhi kya karo
Sabse clean route:

department ko null=True, blank=True karo

old Course rows delete karo

migrate chalao

admin se fresh departments banao

fresh courses banao

Isse 5 minute me issue solve ho jayega.

Agar chaho, main tumhe exact courses/models.py aur shell commands ka final clean version ek saath de deta hoon.

Thought for 30s
Issue clear hai: ORM use nahi kar sakte, kyunki model aur DB schema mismatch ho chuka hai.

Abhi:

model bol raha hai department_id hona chahiye

DB me abhi old column/value state hai

isliye Course.objects.all().delete() bhi fail kar raha hai

Best fix abhi
Kyuki Course module abhi naya hai, aur purana course data important nahi lag raha, to courses table ko raw SQL se empty karke migration complete karte hain.

Step 1 — courses/models.py ko temporarily safe banao
Ensure ye aisa ho:

from django.db import models
from departments.models import Department
from faculty.models import Faculty

class Course(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100, default="TEMP")
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20, default="TEMP")
    department = models.ForeignKey(Department, on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True)
    duration = models.IntegerField(default=3)
    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Step 2 — raw SQL se old course rows delete karo

from django.db import models
from courses.models import Course
from faculty.models import Faculty

class Subject(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    course = models.ForeignKey(Course, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name

Haan, course module me ye 3 polish bachi hui hain. Inko kar dete hain, phir course module fully complete maanenge.

1) Search
courses/views.py
course_list ko isse replace karo:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.db.models import Q
from .models import Course
from .forms import CourseForm


def course_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get("q")

    if query:
        course_qs = Course.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(code__icontains=query) |
            Q(department__name__icontains=query) |
            Q(faculty__name__icontains=query)
        ).order_by("id")
    else:
        course_qs = Course.objects.all().order_by("id")

    paginator = Paginator(course_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get("page")
    courses = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, "courses/course_list.html", {"courses": courses})
2) Pagination
Ye upar wale view me add ho chuki hai. Ab template me UI add karna hai.

    <h2 class="mb-0">Course List</h2>
    <a href="/courses/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Course</a>
</div>

<form method="GET" class="row g-2 mb-3">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search Course" value="{{ request.GET.q }}">
    </div>
    <div class="col-auto">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark">Search</button>
    </div>
</form>

<div class="table-responsive">
    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped align-middle">
        <thead class="table-dark">
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>Name</th>
                <th>Code</th>
                <th>Department</th>
                <th>Faculty</th>
                <th>Duration</th>
                <th>Actions</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
        {% for course in courses %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ course.id }}</td>
                <td>{{ course.name }}</td>
                <td>{{ course.code }}</td>
                <td>{{ course.department }}</td>
                <td>{{ course.faculty }}</td>
                <td>{{ course.duration }}</td>
                <td>
                    <a href="/courses/profile/{{ course.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                    <a href="/courses/edit/{{ course.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                    <a href="/courses/delete/{{ course.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                </td>
            </tr>
        {% empty %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="7" class="text-center">No courses found.</td>
            </tr>
        {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>

<nav>
    <ul class="pagination">
        {% if courses.has_previous %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">First</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ courses.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Previous</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}

        <li class="page-item disabled">
            <span class="page-link">Page {{ courses.number }} of {{ courses.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
        </li>

        {% if courses.has_next %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ courses.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Next</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ courses.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Last</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}
    </ul>
</nav>

{% endblock %}

Step 3 — subjects/models.py
from django.db import models
from courses.models import Course
from faculty.models import Faculty

class Subject(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    code = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    course = models.ForeignKey(Course, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    faculty = models.ForeignKey(Faculty, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Step 4 — migrations

python manage.py migrate
Step 5 — subjects/forms.py
from django import forms
from .models import Subject

class SubjectForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Subject
        fields = "__all__"
Step 6 — subjects/views.py
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from .models import Subject
from .forms import SubjectForm

def subject_list(request):
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("id")
    return render(request, "subjects/subject_list.html", {"subjects": subjects})

def add_subject(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = SubjectForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Subject added successfully.")
            return redirect("subject_list")
    else:
        form = SubjectForm()

    return render(request, "subjects/add_subject.html", {"form": form})

def edit_subject(request, pk):
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = SubjectForm(request.POST, instance=subject)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Subject updated successfully.")
            return redirect("subject_list")
    else:
        form = SubjectForm(instance=subject)

    return render(request, "subjects/edit_subject.html", {"form": form})

def delete_subject(request, pk):
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Subject deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("subject_list")

    return render(request, "subjects/delete_subject.html", {"subject": subject})

def subject_profile(request, pk):
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "subjects/subject_profile.html", {"subject": subject})
Step 7 — subjects/urls.py
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path("", views.subject_list, name="subject_list"),
    path("add/", views.add_subject, name="add_subject"),
    path("edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_subject, name="edit_subject"),
    path("delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_subject, name="delete_subject"),
    path("profile/<int:pk>/", views.subject_profile, name="subject_profile"),
]

Perfect 👍
Ab Student + Faculty + Course + Subject ho gaya.

Ab next sabse important real ERP module hai:

Attendance Module
Ye module subject aur student dono par depend karta hai, isliye ab banana sahi step hai.

Attendance module me kya banega
Mark Attendance

Attendance List

Student wise attendance

Subject wise attendance

Date wise attendance

Flow:

Student + Subject + Date + Status(Present/Absent)
Step 1 — attendance/models.py
Isko update karo:

from django.db import models
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject

class Attendance(models.Model):
    student = models.ForeignKey(Student, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    date = models.DateField()
    status = models.CharField(
        max_length=10,
        choices=[
            ('Present', 'Present'),
            ('Absent', 'Absent'),
        ]
    )

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.student} - {self.subject} - {self.date}"
Step 2 — migrations
python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
Step 3 — attendance/forms.py
Create karo:

from django import forms
from .models import Attendance

class AttendanceForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Attendance
        fields = "__all__"
Step 4 — attendance/views.py
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from .models import Attendance
from .forms import AttendanceForm

def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.all().order_by("-date", "id")
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {"attendances": attendances})

def add_attendance(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance added successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm()

    return render(request, "attendance/add_attendance.html", {"form": form})

def edit_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST, instance=attendance)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance updated successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm(instance=attendance)

    return render(request, "attendance/edit_attendance.html", {"form": form})

def delete_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        attendance.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Attendance deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/delete_attendance.html", {"attendance": attendance})

def attendance_profile(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_profile.html", {"attendance": attendance})
Step 5 — attendance/urls.py
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path("", views.attendance_list, name="attendance_list"),
    path("add/", views.add_attendance, name="add_attendance"),
    path("edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_attendance, name="edit_attendance"),
    path("delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_attendance, name="delete_attendance"),
    path("profile/<int:pk>/", views.attendance_profile, name="attendance_profile"),
]

(venv) PS C:\Users\lenovo\college_erp> python manage.py makemigrations
>> python manage.py migrate
It is impossible to add a non-nullable field 'subject' to attendance without specifying a default. This is because the database needs something to populate existing rows.
Please select a fix:
 1) Provide a one-off default now (will be set on all existing rows with a null value for this column)
 2) Quit and manually define a default value in models.py.
Select an option:

Ye error normal Django migration issue hai.
Reason: Attendance table me already rows hain, aur tumne naya field subject add kiya hai jo non-nullable hai. Database ko pata nahi ki purani rows me kya value dale.

Isko correct professional way se fix karte hain.

Best Fix (recommended)
attendance/models.py me subject ko temporarily nullable bana do.

Change this
subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
To this
subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True)
Fir migration run karo
python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
Ab migration easily ho jayegi.

Baad me kya karenge
Jab attendance module stable ho jayega tab:

1️⃣ existing attendance records me subject fill karenge
2️⃣ phir null=True hata denge

Alternative quick fix (agar attendance data important nahi hai)
Agar attendance table me important data nahi hai to simply table clear kar sakte ho:

python manage.py shell
from attendance.models import Attendance
Attendance.objects.all().delete()
exit()
Fir migrate.

Recommendation
ERP development stage me best solution:

subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True)
Important next step
Jab migration ho jaye to mujhe bolo:

“attendance migrate done”

Phir hum attendance ko real ERP level pe upgrade karenge:

Mark attendance for whole class

Student attendance percentage

Subject wise attendance report

Date wise attendance filter

Ye ERP ka most impressive module hota hai.


Jab ye ho jaye, next step me hum attendance ko smart banayenge:

student attendance percentage

subject wise attendance

date filters 

Bilkul — basic attendance ke baad ye 3 features hi next smart step hain. Inse attendance module real ERP jaisa lagega.

Ab attendance me kya add karenge
1. Student attendance percentage
Har student ka overall attendance %.

Formula:

(Present classes / Total classes) * 100
Example:

Total = 20

Present = 16

Percentage = 80%

2. Subject wise attendance
Ek student ka har subject me alag attendance.

Example:

Python → 85%

DBMS → 72%

OS → 90%

3. Date filters
Attendance list ko filter kar paoge:

specific date

from date

to date

subject wise

student wise

Best order ye rahega
Step 1 — attendance list me filters
Sabse pehle filtering add karte hain.

attendance/views.py me attendance_list ko replace karo:
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from .models import Attendance

def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.all().order_by("-date", "id")

    student = request.GET.get("student")
    subject = request.GET.get("subject")
    date = request.GET.get("date")

    if student:
        attendances = attendances.filter(student__id=student)

    if subject:
        attendances = attendances.filter(subject__id=subject)

    if date:
        attendances = attendances.filter(date=date)

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {"attendances": attendances})
Step 2 — attendance_list.html me filter form add karo
Table ke upar ye add karo:

<form method="GET" class="row g-2 mb-3">
    <div class="col-md-3">
        <input type="number" name="student" class="form-control" placeholder="Student ID" value="{{ request.GET.student }}">
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <input type="number" name="subject" class="form-control" placeholder="Subject ID" value="{{ request.GET.subject }}">
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <input type="date" name="date" class="form-control" value="{{ request.GET.date }}">
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark">Filter</button>
        <a href="/attendance/" class="btn btn-secondary">Reset</a>
    </div>
</form>
Step 3 — Student attendance percentage view
attendance/views.py me add karo:

from students.models import Student

def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)
Step 4 — URL add karo
attendance/urls.py me add karo:

path("student-percentage/<int:student_id>/", views.student_attendance_percentage, name="student_attendance_percentage"),
Step 5 — template banao
templates/attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html

{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<div class="card shadow">
    <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Student Attendance Percentage</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <p><strong>Student:</strong> {{ student }}</p>
        <p><strong>Total Classes:</strong> {{ total_classes }}</p>
        <p><strong>Present Classes:</strong> {{ present_classes }}</p>
        <p><strong>Attendance Percentage:</strong> {{ percentage|floatformat:2 }}%</p>

        <a href="/attendance/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}
Step 6 — Subject wise attendance percentage
attendance/views.py me add karo:

from subjects.models import Subject

def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)
Step 7 — URL add karo
path("subject-percentage/<int:student_id>/<int:subject_id>/", views.subject_attendance_percentage, name="subject_attendance_percentage"),
Step 8 — template banao
templates/attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html

{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<div class="card shadow">
    <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Subject Wise Attendance</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <p><strong>Student:</strong> {{ student }}</p>
        <p><strong>Subject:</strong> {{ subject }}</p>
        <p><strong>Total Classes:</strong> {{ total_classes }}</p>
        <p><strong>Present Classes:</strong> {{ present_classes }}</p>
        <p><strong>Attendance Percentage:</strong> {{ percentage|floatformat:2 }}%</p>

        <a href="/attendance/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}

Error clear hai:

AttributeError: module 'attendance.views' has no attribute 'subject_attendance_percentage'
Matlab attendance/urls.py me tumne ye URL add kar diya hai:

path("subject-percentage/<int:student_id>/<int:subject_id>/", views.subject_attendance_percentage, name="subject_attendance_percentage"),
lekin attendance/views.py me subject_attendance_percentage function abhi maujood nahi hai.

Fix
Option 1 — best
attendance/views.py me ye function add karo:

from subjects.models import Subject
from students.models import Student
from django.shortcuts import get_object_or_404, render

def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student=student,
        subject=subject,
        status="Present"
    ).count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)
Saath me ye bhi ensure karo ki attendance/views.py ke imports me ye ho:
from subjects.models import Subject
from students.models import Student
from .models import Attendance
Option 2 — temporary
Agar abhi ye feature nahi banana aur sirf server chalana hai, to attendance/urls.py se ye line hata do:

path("subject-percentage/<int:student_id>/<int:subject_id>/", views.subject_attendance_percentage, name="subject_attendance_percentage"),
Lekin better hai function add kar do.

Fix
attendance/views.py me ye function add karo
from students.models import Student
from django.shortcuts import get_object_or_404, render
from .models import Attendance


def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student=student,
        status="Present"
    ).count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)

Important
attendance/views.py ke imports me ye bhi hona chahiye:

from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject

Best clean step
Agar confusion ho raha hai, to attendance/views.py ka full final version ye rakho:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject
from .models import Attendance
from .forms import AttendanceForm


def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.all().order_by("-date", "id")

    student = request.GET.get("student")
    subject = request.GET.get("subject")
    date = request.GET.get("date")

    if student:
        attendances = attendances.filter(student__id=student)

    if subject:
        attendances = attendances.filter(subject__id=subject)

    if date:
        attendances = attendances.filter(date=date)

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {"attendances": attendances})


def add_attendance(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance added successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm()

    return render(request, "attendance/add_attendance.html", {"form": form})


def edit_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST, instance=attendance)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance updated successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm(instance=attendance)

    return render(request, "attendance/edit_attendance.html", {"form": form})


def delete_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        attendance.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Attendance deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/delete_attendance.html", {"attendance": attendance})


def attendance_profile(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_profile.html", {"attendance": attendance})


def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)


def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)

ho gya ab run krke attendace kese pta kre 

Great 👍 ab server chal raha hai. Ab attendance check kaise karna hai, ye step-by-step dekhte hain.

1️⃣ Attendance add karo
Browser me jao:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/attendance/add/
Form me ye fields aayengi:

Student

Subject

Date

Status (Present / Absent)

Example:

Student : Prateek
Subject : Python
Date : 2026-03-06
Status : Present
Save karo.

Phir 3-4 records add karo.

Example:

Student	Subject	Date	Status
Prateek	Python	6 Mar	Present
Prateek	Python	7 Mar	Present
Prateek	Python	8 Mar	Absent
2️⃣ Attendance list dekho
Open:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/attendance/
Yaha tumhe table dikhega:

Student | Subject | Date | Status
3️⃣ Student attendance percentage
Example URL:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/attendance/student-percentage/1/
yaha 1 = student id

Output example:

Student: Prateek
Total Classes: 3
Present Classes: 2
Attendance Percentage: 66.67%
4️⃣ Subject wise attendance
Example:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/attendance/subject-percentage/1/1/
Meaning:

student id = 1
subject id = 1
Output:

Student: Prateek
Subject: Python
Total Classes: 3
Present Classes: 2
Attendance Percentage: 66%
5️⃣ Attendance filter
Attendance page pe use karo:

/attendance/?student=1
ya

/attendance/?subject=1
ya

/attendance/?date=2026-03-06

1) Whole class attendance system
Isse ek subject aur date select karke poori class ke students ki attendance ek saath mark kar paoge.

attendance/views.py me ye function add karo
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject
from .models import Attendance
from django.contrib import messages
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect

def mark_class_attendance(request):
    students = Student.objects.all().order_by("id")
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("id")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_id = request.POST.get("subject")
        date = request.POST.get("date")

        subject = Subject.objects.get(id=subject_id)

        for student in students:
            status = request.POST.get(f"status_{student.id}")

            if status:
                Attendance.objects.create(
                    student=student,
                    subject=subject,
                    date=date,
                    status=status
                )

        messages.success(request, "Class attendance marked successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/mark_class_attendance.html", {
        "students": students,
        "subjects": subjects,
    })
attendance/urls.py me add karo

{% block content %}

<div class="card shadow">
    <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Mark Class Attendance</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <form method="POST">
            {% csrf_token %}

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Subject</label>
                <select name="subject" class="form-control" required>
                    <option value="">Select Subject</option>
                    {% for subject in subjects %}
                        <option value="{{ subject.id }}">{{ subject.name }}</option>
                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="mb-3">
                <label class="form-label">Date</label>
                <input type="date" name="date" class="form-control" required>
            </div>

            <table class="table table-bordered">
                <thead class="table-dark">
                    <tr>
                        <th>Student</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for student in students %}
                    <tr>
                        <td>{{ student }}</td>
                        <td>
                            <select name="status_{% raw %}{{ student.id }}{% endraw %}" class="form-control" required>
                                <option value="">Select</option>
                                <option value="Present">Present</option>
                                <option value="Absent">Absent</option>
                            </select>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>

            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">Save Attendance</button>
            <a href="/attendance/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}
2) Student attendance report page
Is page me ek student ka overall + subject wise attendance summary dikhega.

attendance/views.py me add karo
def student_attendance_report(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all()

    overall_total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    overall_present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if overall_total > 0:
        overall_percentage = (overall_present / overall_total) * 100

    subject_reports = []

    for subject in subjects:
        total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
        present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

        percentage = 0
        if total > 0:
            percentage = (present / total) * 100

        if total > 0:
            subject_reports.append({
                "subject": subject,
                "total": total,
                "present": present,
                "percentage": percentage,
            })

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "overall_total": overall_total,
        "overall_present": overall_present,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
        "subject_reports": subject_reports,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_report.html", context)
attendance/urls.py me add karo
path("student-report/<int:student_id>/", views.student_attendance_report, name="student_attendance_report"),
templates/attendance/student_attendance_report.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<div class="card shadow mb-4">
    <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Student Attendance Report</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <p><strong>Student:</strong> {{ student }}</p>
        <p><strong>Total Classes:</strong> {{ overall_total }}</p>
        <p><strong>Present Classes:</strong> {{ overall_present }}</p>
        <p><strong>Overall Percentage:</strong> {{ overall_percentage|floatformat:2 }}%</p>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="card shadow">
    <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Subject Wise Attendance</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <table class="table table-bordered">
            <thead class="table-dark">
                <tr>
                    <th>Subject</th>
                    <th>Total Classes</th>
                    <th>Present</th>
                    <th>Percentage</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for item in subject_reports %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ item.subject }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.total }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.present }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.percentage|floatformat:2 }}%</td>
                </tr>
                {% empty %}
                <tr>
                    <td colspan="4" class="text-center">No attendance data found.</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}
3) Attendance dashboard cards
attendance/views.py me add karo
def attendance_dashboard(request):
    total_records = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_present = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Present").count()
    total_absent = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Absent").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if total_records > 0:
        overall_percentage = (total_present / total_records) * 100

    context = {
        "total_records": total_records,
        "total_present": total_present,
        "total_absent": total_absent,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_dashboard.html", context)
attendance/urls.py me add karo
path("dashboard/", views.attendance_dashboard, name="attendance_dashboard"),

Sab kaafi achha chal raha hai. Abhi 2 issues hain:

1. mark-class page error
Problem ye hai ki template me maine galti se {% raw %} use karwa diya tha. Django templates me yahan uski zarurat nahi hai.

attendance/templates/attendance/mark_class_attendance.html
Is line ko:

<select name="status_{% raw %}{{ student.id }}{% endraw %}" class="form-control" required>
replace karo:

<select name="status_{{ student.id }}" class="form-control" required>
Bas itna fix karna hai.

2. URL typo
Tumne browser me ye khola:

/attendance/student-parcentage/1/
Aur:

/attendance/student-parcentage/1/1/
Yahan spelling galat hai: parcentage ❌

Sahi URLs:
Student overall percentage:

/attendance/student-percentage/1/
Subject wise percentage:

/attendance/subject-percentage/1/1/
Ab kya test karna hai

1) Faculty ko Subject Assign karne ka UI page
Tumhare Subject model me already faculty field hai, to alag assignment model ki zarurat nahi. Hum bas ek page banayenge jahan faculty choose karke multiple subjects assign kar pao.

faculty/views.py me ye imports add karo
from subjects.models import Subject
from django.contrib import messages
faculty/views.py me ye function add karo
def assign_subjects_to_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("name")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_ids = request.POST.getlist("subjects")

        # Pehle is faculty ke current assigned subjects hata do
        Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).update(faculty=None)

        # Phir selected subjects assign karo
        Subject.objects.filter(id__in=subject_ids).update(faculty=faculty)

        messages.success(request, "Subjects assigned successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_profile", pk=faculty.id)

    assigned_subject_ids = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).values_list("id", flat=True)

    return render(request, "faculty/assign_subjects.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "subjects": subjects,
        "assigned_subject_ids": assigned_subject_ids,
    })
faculty/urls.py me ye path add karo
path("assign-subjects/<int:pk>/", views.assign_subjects_to_faculty, name="assign_subjects_to_faculty"),
templates/faculty/assign_subjects.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block content %}

<div class="row justify-content-center">
    <div class="col-md-8">
        <div class="card shadow">
            <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                <h4 class="mb-0">Assign Subjects to {{ faculty.name }}</h4>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="POST">
                    {% csrf_token %}

                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <label class="form-label"><strong>Select Subjects</strong></label>

                        {% for subject in subjects %}
                            <div class="form-check">
                                <input
                                    class="form-check-input"
                                    type="checkbox"
                                    name="subjects"
                                    value="{{ subject.id }}"
                                    id="subject{{ subject.id }}"
                                    {% if subject.id in assigned_subject_ids %}checked{% endif %}
                                >
                                <label class="form-check-label" for="subject{{ subject.id }}">
                                    {{ subject.name }} ({{ subject.course }})
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">Save Assignment</button>
                    <a href="/faculty/profile/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}

def faculty_profile(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    assigned_subjects = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).order_by("name")

    return render(request, "faculty/faculty_profile.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "assigned_subjects": assigned_subjects,
    })

    {% if assigned_subjects %}
        <ul class="list-group">
            {% for subject in assigned_subjects %}
                <li class="list-group-item">
                    {{ subject.name }} - {{ subject.course }}
                </li>
            {% endfor %}

    {% else %}
        <p class="text-muted">No subjects assigned.</p>
    {% endif %}
