@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_edit(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        print("FILES RECEIVED:", request.FILES)

    form = StudentForm(request.POST or None, request.FILES or None, instance=student)

    if form.is_valid():

photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

Step 2: students/views.py me save ko force-check karo

from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.db.models import Q
from django.shortcuts import get_object_or_404, redirect, render

from core.decorators import role_required
from .forms import StudentForm
from .models import Student


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    students = Student.objects.select_related('user').all().order_by('id')

    if query:
        students = students.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query) |
            Q(user__username__icontains=query)
        )

    paginator = Paginator(students, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    page_obj = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {
        'students': page_obj,
        'query': query,
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_add(request):
    if request.method == 'POST':
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            student = form.save(commit=False)

            if 'photo' in request.FILES:
                student.photo = request.FILES['photo']

            student.save()
            form.save_m2m()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("ADD FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Add Student'
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_edit(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            student = form.save(commit=False)

            if 'photo' in request.FILES:
                student.photo = request.FILES['photo']

            student.save()
            form.save_m2m()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_profile', pk=student.pk)
        else:
            print("EDIT FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Edit Student'
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_delete(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('student_list')

    return render(request, 'students/student_confirm_delete.html', {
        'student': student
    })


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student.objects.select_related('user'), pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, 'students/student_profile.html', {
        'student': student
    })
Step 3: students/forms.py same rakho, but final exact version ye ho
from django import forms
from .models import Student


class StudentForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Student
        fields = [
            'user',
            'name',
            'enrollment_number',
            'course',
            'year',
            'phone',
            'address',
            'date_of_birth',
            'gender',
            'photo',
            'admission_date',
        ]
        widgets = {
            'user': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'name': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'enrollment_number': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'course': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'year': forms.NumberInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'phone': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'address': forms.Textarea(attrs={'class': 'form-control', 'rows': 3}),
            'date_of_birth': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
            'gender': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'photo': forms.ClearableFileInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'admission_date': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
        }

    <h2 class="mb-4">{{ title }}</h2>

    {% if form.errors %}
        <div class="alert alert-danger">
            {{ form.errors }}
        </div>
    {% endif %}

    <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
        {% csrf_token %}
        {{ form.as_p }}

        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Save</button>
        <a href="{% url 'student_list' %}" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
    </form>
</div>
{% endblock %}

templates/students/student_profile.html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}Student Profile{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Student Profile{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
            {% if student.photo %}
                <img src="{{ student.photo.url }}" alt="Student Photo"
                     class="img-fluid rounded shadow"
                     style="max-height: 250px; object-fit: cover;">
            {% else %}
                <div class="border rounded p-5 bg-light">No Photo</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-8">
            <h2>{{ student.name }}</h2>
            <hr>

            <p><strong>Username:</strong> {{ student.user.username }}</p>
            <p><strong>Email:</strong> {{ student.user.email }}</p>
            <p><strong>Enrollment Number:</strong> {{ student.enrollment_number }}</p>
            <p><strong>Course:</strong> {{ student.course }}</p>
            <p><strong>Year:</strong> {{ student.year }}</p>
            <p><strong>Phone:</strong> {{ student.phone }}</p>
            <p><strong>Gender:</strong> {{ student.gender }}</p>
            <p><strong>Date of Birth:</strong> {{ student.date_of_birth }}</p>
            <p><strong>Admission Date:</strong> {{ student.admission_date }}</p>
            <p><strong>Address:</strong> {{ student.address }}</p>

            <div class="mt-4">
                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <a href="{% url 'student_edit' student.id %}" class="btn btn-warning">Edit</a>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_delete' student.id %}" class="btn btn-danger">Delete</a>
                {% endif %}
                <a href="{% url 'student_list' %}" class="btn btn-secondary">Back to List</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
Step 6: list template me image code exact aisa ho
templates/students/student_list.html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}Student List{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Student List{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        <h2>Student List</h2>
        {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
            <a href="{% url 'student_add' %}" class="btn btn-primary">Add Student</a>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <form method="get" class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-10">
            <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search..." value="{{ query }}">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-2">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark w-100">Search</button>
        </div>
    </form>

    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
        <thead class="table-dark">
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>Photo</th>
                <th>Name</th>
                <th>Enrollment No.</th>
                <th>Course</th>
                <th>Year</th>
                <th>Profile</th>
                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <th>Actions</th>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for student in students %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ student.id }}</td>
                <td>
                    {% if student.photo %}
                        <img src="{{ student.photo.url }}" alt="Photo"
                             width="50" height="50"
                             style="object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
                    {% else %}
                        No Photo
                    {% endif %}
                </td>
                <td>{{ student.name }}</td>
                <td>{{ student.enrollment_number }}</td>
                <td>{{ student.course }}</td>
                <td>{{ student.year }}</td>
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_profile' student.id %}" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                </td>

                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_edit' student.id %}" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_delete' student.id %}" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                </td>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
            {% empty %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="8" class="text-center">No students found.</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
{% endblock %}

Thought for 11s
Abhi bhi print(s.photo) blank aa raha hai, matlab photo save nahi ho rahi.
302 sirf itna batata hai ki form submit hua — photo field save hui ho, ye confirm nahi hota.

Sabse likely reason
Browser se file POST me aa hi nahi rahi.
File input har submit par dobara choose karni padti hai. Agar file select nahi hoti, form valid reh sakta hai aur baaki data save ho jata hai — photo blank hi rehti hai.

Ab exact debug karo
students/views.py me student_edit ko temporary ye exact code bana do:

@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_edit(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        print("FILES RECEIVED =", request.FILES)

    form = StudentForm(request.POST or None, request.FILES or None, instance=student)

    if form.is_valid():
        student = form.save(commit=False)

        if 'photo' in request.FILES:
            student.photo = request.FILES['photo']

        student.save()
        form.save_m2m()

        print("SAVED PHOTO NAME =", student.photo.name)
        messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
        return redirect('student_profile', pk=student.pk)
    else:
        print("FORM ERRORS =", form.errors)

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Edit Student'
    })

Final problem
Photo browser se POST hi nahi ho rahi, isliye:

DB me student.photo blank rehta hai

media/student_photos/ me file aati hi nahi

profile/list me No Photo dikh raha hai

Ab isko direct aur pakka tareeke se fix karte hain.

Step 1: students/forms.py ko ye code karo
from django import forms
from .models import Student


class StudentForm(forms.ModelForm):
    photo = forms.ImageField(required=False)

    class Meta:
        model = Student
        fields = [
            'user',
            'name',
            'enrollment_number',
            'course',
            'year',
            'phone',
            'address',
            'date_of_birth',
            'gender',
            'photo',
            'admission_date',
        ]
        widgets = {
            'user': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'name': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'enrollment_number': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'course': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'year': forms.NumberInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'phone': forms.TextInput(attrs={'class': 'form-control'}),
            'address': forms.Textarea(attrs={'class': 'form-control', 'rows': 3}),
            'date_of_birth': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
            'gender': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'admission_date': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
        }
Step 2: students/views.py me add/edit ko is exact code se replace karo
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.db.models import Q
from django.shortcuts import get_object_or_404, redirect, render

from core.decorators import role_required
from .forms import StudentForm
from .models import Student


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    students = Student.objects.select_related('user').all().order_by('id')

    if query:
        students = students.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query) |
            Q(user__username__icontains=query)
        )

    paginator = Paginator(students, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    page_obj = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {
        'students': page_obj,
        'query': query,
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_add(request):
    if request.method == 'POST':
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        print("ADD FILES =", request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            student = form.save(commit=False)

            if request.FILES.get('photo'):
                student.photo = request.FILES.get('photo')

            student.save()
            print("ADD SAVED PHOTO =", student.photo)
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("ADD FORM ERRORS =", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Add Student'
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_edit(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        print("EDIT FILES =", request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            student = form.save(commit=False)

            if request.FILES.get('photo'):
                student.photo = request.FILES.get('photo')

            student.save()
            print("EDIT SAVED PHOTO =", student.photo)
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_profile', pk=student.pk)
        else:
            print("EDIT FORM ERRORS =", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Edit Student'
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_delete(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('student_list')

    return render(request, 'students/student_confirm_delete.html', {
        'student': student
    })


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student.objects.select_related('user'), pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, 'students/student_profile.html', {
        'student': student
    })

Pillow thik hai.
Matlab issue image library ka nahi hai.

Abhi bhi final truth ye hai:

print(s.photo)
blank hai, so file database me save hi nahi hui.

Ab next exact kaam
Ab shell se kuch aur prove nahi hoga.
Ab hume POST ke time file aa rahi hai ya nahi ye dekhna padega.

students/views.py me student_edit ko exact ye banao
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_edit(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == 'POST':
        print("EDIT FILES =", request.FILES)
        print("POST KEYS =", list(request.POST.keys()))

    form = StudentForm(request.POST or None, request.FILES or None, instance=student)

    if form.is_valid():
        student = form.save(commit=False)

        if request.FILES.get('photo'):
            student.photo = request.FILES.get('photo')

        student.save()
        print("EDIT SAVED PHOTO =", student.photo)
        messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
        return redirect('student_profile', pk=student.pk)
    else:
        print("EDIT FORM ERRORS =", form.errors)

    return render(request, 'students/student_form.html', {
        'form': form,
        'title': 'Edit Student'
    })
Phir ye karo
server restart karo

python manage.py runserver
/students/edit/1/ kholo

photo choose karo

save karo

terminal ka output copy karo

Mujhe kya chahiye
Bas ye 3 lines ka output:

EDIT FILES = ...

POST KEYS = ...

EDIT SAVED PHOTO = ...

Kya likely issue ho sakta hai
Agar EDIT FILES = <MultiValueDict: {}> aata hai, to:

browser file bhej hi nahi raha

ya photo input render hi nahi ho raha

ya wrong field name se aa raha hai

Agar EDIT FILES me photo aaye but EDIT SAVED PHOTO blank ho, to form/model side ka issue hai.

Ek aur quick check
Edit page me right above save button temporarily ye line daal do student_form.html me:

<p>Photo field name check: {{ form.photo.name }}</p>
{{ form.photo }}
Isse page par field ka actual naam dikh jayega. Ye photo hi hona chahiye.

Jab terminal output aa jayega, tab exact root cause pakad lenge.


tum faculty wale module k code se compare kro usme photo upload or show ho rhi h shyd bhaa se kuch help ho


Thought for 12s
Haan, faculty module se compare karna best idea hai.
Kyuki agar faculty me photo upload bhi ho rahi hai aur show bhi, to same pattern student module me bhi hona chahiye.

Sabse important observation
Tumhare student code me surface level sab thik lag raha hai:

model me ImageField

form me photo

view me request.FILES

template me enctype

Phir bhi save nahi ho rahi.
Aise case me most likely hidden mismatch hota hai.

Faculty vs Student compare karke likely issues
Ye 4 jagah compare karo:

1. Model field name
Faculty me shayad aisa hai:

photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='faculty_photos/', blank=True, null=True)
Student me bhi aisa hi hona chahiye:

photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)
Agar student me field name photo hai but template/form/view me kahin aur naam use ho raha ho, to save nahi hogi.

2. Form rendering style
Faculty module me agar tumne manually field render ki hai, aur student me {{ form.as_p }} use ho raha tha ya kuch custom mismatch tha, to file input silently issue de sakta hai.

Ab tumne manual render kiya hai, jo better hai.

3. View save pattern
Faculty me agar aisa code hai:

form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
if form.is_valid():
    form.save()
aur student me bhi same hai, to dono work karne chahiye.

Agar faculty me request.FILES clearly aa rahi hai, but student me nahi, to issue browser/form level hai.

4. Duplicate module / wrong file problem
Ye sabse dangerous aur likely issue hai.

Pehle ke analysis me bhi indication tha ki project me kuch duplication/confusion ho sakta hai.

Matlab possible hai:

tum ek students/views.py edit kar rahe ho

but URL kisi aur view ko hit kar raha ho

ya template dusri file use ho rahi ho

ya student model ka old version load ho raha ho

Ye reason tab aur strong ho jata hai jab:

code sahi lag raha ho

phir bhi DB me field blank aa rahi ho

Mere hisaab se strongest 2 suspects
Suspect 1: wrong code file execute ho rahi hai
Kyuki maine tumhe debug print line lagane ko bola tha, but terminal me wo prints consistently nahi aaye.
Iska matlab:

ya updated view load nahi hui

ya route expected view ko hit nahi kar raha

Suspect 2: faculty module ka pattern alag hai
Ho sakta hai faculty app me:

simple form ho

ya image upload direct save ho rahi ho

ya custom template field better ho

Ab exact best step
Mujhe faculty module ke ye 3 files bhejo:

faculty/models.py

faculty/views.py

faculty ka form file (faculty/forms.py ya jo bhi use kar rahe ho)

Phir main:

student module se exact compare karunga

jo difference photo upload ko break kar raha hai, wo pakad ke

student module ka corrected final code dunga

Abhi ka practical conclusion
Student photo issue normal syntax problem nahi lag raha.
Ye pattern mismatch ya wrong file execution wala issue lag raha hai.
Faculty code compare karke exact cause mil jayega.

Faculty ke 3 code files bhejo.


from django.db import models

class Faculty(models.Model):

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100,null=True, blank=True)

    email = models.EmailField(null=True, blank=True)

    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15,null=True, blank=True)

    department = models.CharField(max_length=100,null=True, blank=True)

    designation = models.CharField(max_length=100,null=True, blank=True)

    date_joined = models.DateField(null=True, blank=True)

    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='faculty_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name faculty / model.py                                           from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from .models import Faculty
from .forms import FacultyForm
from django.contrib import messages
from subjects.models import Subject
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from core.decorators import role_required


# LIST
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def faculty_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.filter(name__icontains=query).order_by('id')
    else:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(faculty_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    faculties = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})

# ADD
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_faculty(request):

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST , request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty added successfully.")
            return redirect('faculty_list')

    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, 'faculty/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})


# EDIT
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_faculty(request, pk):

    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST , request.FILES , instance=faculty)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty updated successfully.")
            return redirect('faculty_list')

    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, 'faculty/edit_faculty.html', {'form': form})


# DELETE
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        faculty.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Faculty deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_list")

    return render(request, "faculty/delete_faculty.html", {"faculty": faculty})

# PROFILE
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def faculty_profile(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    assigned_subjects = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).order_by("name")

    return render(request, "faculty/faculty_profile.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "assigned_subjects": assigned_subjects,
    })

@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def assign_subjects_to_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("name")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_ids = request.POST.getlist("subjects")

        # Pehle is faculty ke current assigned subjects hata do
        Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).update(faculty=None)

        # Phir selected subjects assign karo
        Subject.objects.filter(id__in=subject_ids).update(faculty=faculty)

        messages.success(request, "Subjects assigned successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_profile", pk=faculty.id)

    assigned_subject_ids = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).values_list("id", flat=True)

    return render(request, "faculty/assign_subjects.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "subjects": subjects,
        "assigned_subject_ids": assigned_subject_ids,
    })  faculty/views.py                                                               from django import forms
from .models import Faculty

class FacultyForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Faculty
        fields = '__all__'

<br>
<a href="{% url 'faculty_list' %}">Back to Faculty List</a> faculty_add.html                             ab isse compare krke fir dubara se student k liye full code doo                                     

Bilkul — faculty module se compare karke ab clear hai ki best approach simple rakhna hai:

forms.py me fields = '__all__' ya direct model fields

views me request.POST, request.FILES

template me enctype="multipart/form-data"

profile/list me simple student.photo.url

Tumhare student module me zyada custom handling ne confusion create kiya.
Ab main tumhe faculty pattern ke bilkul close student module ka clean full code de raha hoon.

1) students/models.py
from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings


class Student(models.Model):
    GENDER_CHOICES = (
        ('male', 'Male'),
        ('female', 'Female'),
        ('other', 'Other'),
    )

    user = models.OneToOneField(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    enrollment_number = models.CharField(max_length=20, unique=True)
    course = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    year = models.IntegerField()

    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    address = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_of_birth = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    gender = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=GENDER_CHOICES, blank=True, null=True)
    date_joined = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)

    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
2) students/forms.py
Faculty pattern jaisa simple form:

from django import forms
from .models import Student


class StudentForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Student
        fields = '__all__'
3) students/views.py
Ye faculty module ke almost same pattern par hai:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


# LIST
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


# ADD
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("ADD FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)

    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


# EDIT
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("EDIT FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)

    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


# DELETE
@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


# PROFILE
@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {
        "student": student,
    })
4) students/urls.py
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('list/', views.student_list, name='student_list'),
    path('add/', views.add_student, name='add_student'),
    path('edit/<int:pk>/', views.edit_student, name='edit_student'),
    path('delete/<int:pk>/', views.delete_student, name='delete_student'),
    path('profile/<int:pk>/', views.student_profile, name='student_profile'),
]

            </tr>
        {% endfor %}

        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>

    <ul class="pagination">
        {% if students.has_previous %}

                <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">First</a>
            </li>

                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Previous</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}

        <li class="page-item disabled">
            <span class="page-link">Page {{ students.number }} of {{ students.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
        </li>

        {% if students.has_next %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Next</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Last</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}
    </ul>
</nav>

{% endblock %}

                    </tr>

                        <td>{{ student.date_of_birth }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Date Joined</th>
                        <td>{{ student.date_joined }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Address</th>
                        <td>{{ student.address }}</td>
                    </tr>
                </table>

                <a href="/students/edit/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning">Edit</a>
                <a href="/students/delete/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger">Delete</a>
                <a href="/students/list/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>

            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

10) Important: config/urls.py
Ensure this line exists:

path("students/", include("students.urls")),
Jo tumhare project me already hai.

11) Important: settings.py
These must exist:

MEDIA_URL = '/media/'
MEDIA_ROOT = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, 'media')
AUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.CustomUser'
Aur config/urls.py me:

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)
Ye bhi already hai.

12) Server run karo
python manage.py runserver
13) Test URLs
http://127.0.0.1:8000/students/list/
http://127.0.0.1:8000/students/add/
http://127.0.0.1:8000/students/edit/1/
http://127.0.0.1:8000/students/profile/1/
14) Sabse important note
Agar existing Student model me admission_date tha aur maine date_joined diya hai, to tum dono me se ek hi field name use karo.
Faculty pattern follow karne ke liye maine date_joined rakha hai.

Agar tum existing DB break nahi karna chahte, to model me date_joined ki jagah admission_date hi rakho, aur template me bhi wahi use karo.

Safer option:
Agar migration avoid karna hai, to ye row use karo instead:

admission_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
Aur profile template me:

<th>Admission Date</th>
<td>{{ student.admission_date }}</td>
Mere hisaab se yehi better hai.

Final recommendation
Student module ke liye final safest fields:

photo

admission_date

not date_joined

So agar chaho, main isi code ka migration-safe final version bhi de sakta hoon jisme existing DB break na ho.

django.db.utils.OperationalError: no such column: students_student.date_joined
[07/Mar/2026 17:02:00] "GET /students/profile/1/ HTTP/1.1" 500 149754  

Ab issue photo wala nahi, DB schema mismatch hai.

Exact problem
Error bol raha hai:

no such column: students_student.date_joined
Matlab:

tumhare current Student model me date_joined field hai

lekin database table me date_joined column bana hi nahi hai

Aur ek aur important clue:

File "C:\Users\lenovo\college_erp\core\views.py", line 82, in edit_student
Matlab /students/edit/1/ kabhi-kabhi students app ke view ki jagah core app ka old view hit kar raha hai.
Yaani project me old student code + new student code dono mix ho rahe hain.

Sabse safe fix
Abhi ke liye date_joined hatao aur existing admission_date hi use karo.
Kyuki purane code me wahi tha aur DB bhi usi ke saath likely bani hui hai.

1) students/models.py ka correct safe version
from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings


class Student(models.Model):
    GENDER_CHOICES = (
        ('male', 'Male'),
        ('female', 'Female'),
        ('other', 'Other'),
    )

    user = models.OneToOneField(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    enrollment_number = models.CharField(max_length=20, unique=True)
    course = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    year = models.IntegerField()

    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    address = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_of_birth = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    gender = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=GENDER_CHOICES, blank=True, null=True)

    admission_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
2) students/forms.py
from django import forms
from .models import Student


class StudentForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Student
        fields = '__all__'
3) students/views.py
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("ADD FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("EDIT FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {
        "student": student,
    })

5) Bahut important: config/urls.py clean karo
Abhi duplicate/conflicting routes hain.
Isko safe version banao:

from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
    path('', include('core.urls')),
    path('', include('accounts.urls')),

    path("students/", include("students.urls")),
    path('faculty/', include('faculty.urls')),
    path('courses/', include('courses.urls')),
    path('subjects/', include('subjects.urls')),
    path('attendance/', include('attendance.urls')),
    path("departments/", include("departments.urls")),
    path('exams/', include('exams.urls')),
    path('finance/', include('finance.urls')),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)
Is line ko hata do:
path('', dashboard, name="dashboard"),
Ye duplicate/conflict create kar rahi hai.

8) Photo issue ke bare me
Abhi pehle ye DB/route conflict solve karo.
Uske baad photo upload dubara test karenge.
Abhi date_joined error ke chalte student module stable hi nahi hai.

Current priority
date_joined hatao, admission_date rakho

duplicate dashboard route hatao

old core student views/urls conflict hatao

Jab ye kar loge, tab next message me core/views.py aur core/urls.py bhej do. Main bata dunga wahan se kya remove karna hai.


ho gya sb thik but photo abhi bhi na aa rhi tum thoda previous given data ko deep annalysis kro fir faculty codes ko dekho bha kya use kiya h usse show krne ko fir tum mujhe  batao sahi se 

Haan — ab jo data tumne diya hai usse deep analysis karke clear picture ye banti hai:

Final analysis
Student photo issue ka reason template show logic nahi lag raha.
Faculty module me photo show ho rahi hai because usme pura flow simple aur consistent hai:

Faculty flow
model:

photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='faculty_photos/', blank=True, null=True)
form:

fields = '__all__'
view:

form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
if form.is_valid():
    form.save()
template:

<form method="POST" enctype="multipart/form-data">
profile/list:

{% if faculty.photo %}
    <img src="{{ faculty.photo.url }}">
{% endif %}
Ye simple chain kaam kar rahi hai.

Student side me kya alag hua
Tumhare student module me repeatedly ye patterns aaye:

kabhi custom form fields

kabhi custom save logic

kabhi date_joined/admission_date mismatch

kabhi core.views aur students.views conflict

kabhi profile/list old templates

aur shell me repeatedly:

print(s.photo)
blank aaya

Iska matlab main root problem show karne me nahi, save hone me hai.

Sabse important conclusion
Agar faculty photo show ho rahi hai aur student photo nahi, to student module ko faculty pattern par bilkul same simple structure me lana chahiye.

Aur ek aur key point:

Student model me user = OneToOneField(...) hai
Faculty model simple hai, Student model thoda complex hai.
Lekin photo save hone me isse issue nahi aana chahiye.

To problem likely inme se ek hai:

1. Student edit/add template me file input naam mismatch
Agar rendered HTML me input ka name expected photo na ho, to file save nahi hogi.

2. Student view ka actual route kahin aur hit ho raha tha
Ye pehle prove ho chuka tha because core.views.edit_student trace me aa raha tha.

3. Student module me old/new code mix hai
Ye sabse strong suspicion hai.

Ab best correct fix
Ab student module ko faculty module ke exact pattern par lao.
No extra custom save logic.
No manual field handling.
No mixed templates.

Sahi final student code
students/models.py
from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings


class Student(models.Model):
    GENDER_CHOICES = (
        ('male', 'Male'),
        ('female', 'Female'),
        ('other', 'Other'),
    )

    user = models.OneToOneField(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    enrollment_number = models.CharField(max_length=20, unique=True)
    course = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    year = models.IntegerField()
    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    address = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_of_birth = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    gender = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=GENDER_CHOICES, blank=True, null=True)
    admission_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name

students/views.py
Bilkul faculty pattern:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print(form.errors)

    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)

        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print(form.errors)

    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {"student": student})

            </tr>

        </tbody>
    </table>

    <ul class="pagination">
        {% if students.has_previous %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">First</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Previous</a>

        {% endif %}

            <span class="page-link">Page {{ students.number }} of {{ students.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
        </li>

        {% if students.has_next %}
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Next</a>
            </li>
            <li class="page-item">
                <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Last</a>
            </li>
        {% endif %}
    </ul>
</nav>

Most important
core/views.py me old student views hatao
Error me ye aa raha tha:

core\views.py", line 82, in edit_student
Matlab core app me old student CRUD abhi bhi pada hua hai.
Ye conflict create kar raha hai.

core/views.py se:

student_list

add_student

edit_student

delete_student

agar hain, remove karo ya ignore karne ke liye unke URLs hatao.

core/urls.py me bhi check karo
Wahan student-related paths nahi hone chahiye.
Student ka saara route sirf students/urls.py me hona chahiye.

Final conclusion
Faculty module me photo isliye chal rahi hai kyunki usme:

simple model

simple form

direct save

no route conflict

Student module me actual blocker tha:

date_joined field mismatch

old core views conflict

overly mixed versions

Ab pehle ye clean karo.
Uske baad photo 90% chance se faculty ki tarah chal jayegi.

Mujhe next core/views.py aur core/urls.py bhejo.


from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.http import HttpResponse
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404

from students.models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm

from decimal import Decimal
from django.shortcuts import render
from students.models import Student
from faculty.models import Faculty
from courses.models import Course
from subjects.models import Subject
from attendance.models import Attendance
from departments.models import Department
from exams.models import Exam, Result
from finance.models import Fee



@login_required
def dashboard(request):
    total_students = Student.objects.count()
    total_faculty = Faculty.objects.count()
    total_courses = Course.objects.count()
    total_subjects = Subject.objects.count()
    total_attendance = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_exams = Exam.objects.count()
    total_results = Result.objects.count()
    total_fees = Fee.objects.count()

    fee_records = Fee.objects.all()
    total_pending_fees = Decimal('0.00')

    for fee in fee_records:
        total_pending_fees += fee.pending_amount()

    if request.user.is_superuser:
        dashboard_title = "Admin Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "faculty":
        dashboard_title = "Faculty Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "student":
        dashboard_title = "Student Dashboard"
    else:
        dashboard_title = "Dashboard"

    context = {
        "dashboard_title": dashboard_title,
        "student_count": total_students,
        "faculty_count": total_faculty,
        "course_count": total_courses,
        "subject_count": total_subjects,
        "attendance_count": total_attendance,
        "exam_count": total_exams,
        "result_count": total_results,
        "fee_count": total_fees,
        "pending_fee_total": total_pending_fees,
    }

    return render(request, "core/dashboard.html", context)

@login_required
def student_list(request):
    students = Student.objects.all()
    return render(request, "core/student_list.html", {"students": students})


@login_required
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("student_list")
    else:
        form = StudentForm()
    return render(request, "core/student_form.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("student_list")
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, "core/student_form.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)
    student.delete()
    return redirect("student_list")    core views.py                                from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path("", views.dashboard, name="home"),
    path('dashboard/', views.dashboard, name='dashboard'),

    path("students/", views.student_list, name="student_list"),
    path("students/add/", views.add_student, name="add_student"),
    path("students/edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_student, name="edit_student"),
    path("students/delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_student, name="delete_student"),
]



    urls.py

Mil gaya exact root cause.
Student photo issue ka main reason yahi conflict hai.

Kya problem hai
Tumhare project me student CRUD do jagah bana hua hai:

1. students app me
/students/list/

/students/add/

/students/edit/<id>/

correct modern code

2. core app me
student_list

add_student

edit_student

delete_student

Aur core/urls.py me ye routes bhi defined hain:

path("students/", views.student_list, name="student_list"),
path("students/add/", views.add_student, name="add_student"),
path("students/edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_student, name="edit_student"),
path("students/delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_student, name="delete_student"),
Iska effect:

named URLs conflict kar rahe hain

kabhi students app ka view hit ho raha hai

kabhi core app ka old view hit ho raha hai

core wala old view request.FILES use hi nahi karta

isliye photo save nahi ho rahi

Ye tumhare trace se prove bhi ho gaya tha:

core\views.py", line 82, in edit_student
Matlab jab tum student edit kar rahe the, actual me core ka old edit_student chal raha tha, not students/views.py.

Final sahi fix
Step 1: core/views.py se ye student functions hata do
Ye poora block remove kar do:

    students = Student.objects.all()
    return render(request, "core/student_list.html", {"students": students})

    return render(request, "core/student_form.html", {"form": form})

    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            return redirect("student_list")
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, "core/student_form.html", {"form": form})

    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    return redirect("student_list")

from decimal import Decimal
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import render

from students.models import Student
from faculty.models import Faculty
from courses.models import Course
from subjects.models import Subject
from attendance.models import Attendance
from exams.models import Exam, Result
from finance.models import Fee


@login_required
def dashboard(request):
    total_students = Student.objects.count()
    total_faculty = Faculty.objects.count()
    total_courses = Course.objects.count()
    total_subjects = Subject.objects.count()
    total_attendance = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_exams = Exam.objects.count()
    total_results = Result.objects.count()
    total_fees = Fee.objects.count()

    fee_records = Fee.objects.all()
    total_pending_fees = Decimal('0.00')

    for fee in fee_records:
        total_pending_fees += fee.pending_amount()

    if request.user.is_superuser:
        dashboard_title = "Admin Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "faculty":
        dashboard_title = "Faculty Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "student":
        dashboard_title = "Student Dashboard"
    else:
        dashboard_title = "Dashboard"

    context = {
        "dashboard_title": dashboard_title,
        "student_count": total_students,
        "faculty_count": total_faculty,
        "course_count": total_courses,
        "subject_count": total_subjects,
        "attendance_count": total_attendance,
        "exam_count": total_exams,
        "result_count": total_results,
        "fee_count": total_fees,
        "pending_fee_total": total_pending_fees,
    }

    return render(request, "core/dashboard.html", context)

from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('list/', views.student_list, name='student_list'),
    path('add/', views.add_student, name='add_student'),
    path('edit/<int:pk>/', views.edit_student, name='edit_student'),

Step 4: students/views.py me faculty-style code rakho
Ye final version rakho:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("ADD FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
        else:
            print("EDIT FORM ERRORS:", form.errors)
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {"student": student})
Step 5: model me date_joined nahi, admission_date rakho
students/models.py me date_joined mat rakho.
Ye rakho:

from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings


class Student(models.Model):
    GENDER_CHOICES = (
        ('male', 'Male'),
        ('female', 'Female'),
        ('other', 'Other'),
    )

    user = models.OneToOneField(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    enrollment_number = models.CharField(max_length=20, unique=True)
    course = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    year = models.IntegerField()
    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    address = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_of_birth = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    gender = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=GENDER_CHOICES, blank=True, null=True)
    admission_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to='student_photos/', blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Step 6: forms simple rakho
students/forms.py:

from django import forms
from .models import Student


class StudentForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Student
        fields = '__all__'

1) core/decorators.py
Ye final clean version rakho:

from functools import wraps
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect


def role_required(allowed_roles=None):
    if allowed_roles is None:
        allowed_roles = []

    def decorator(view_func):
        @wraps(view_func)
        def wrapper(request, *args, **kwargs):
            if not request.user.is_authenticated:
                return redirect('login')

            if request.user.is_superuser:
                return view_func(request, *args, **kwargs)

            user_role = getattr(request.user, 'role', None)

            if user_role in allowed_roles:
                return view_func(request, *args, **kwargs)

            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

        return wrapper
    return decorator
2) templates/core/forbidden.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Access Denied{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Access Denied{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card text-center">
    <div class="py-4">
        <h2 class="text-danger mb-3">Access Denied</h2>
        <p class="text-muted mb-4">You are not authorized to access this page.</p>
        <a href="/dashboard/" class="btn btn-primary">Back to Dashboard</a>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
3) students/views.py
Student module ke liye final role logic:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {"student": student})
4) faculty/views.py
Faculty pages sirf faculty/admin ke liye:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from .models import Faculty
from .forms import FacultyForm
from django.contrib import messages
from subjects.models import Subject
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from core.decorators import role_required


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def faculty_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.filter(name__icontains=query).order_by('id')
    else:
        faculty_qs = Faculty.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(faculty_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    faculties = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'faculty/faculty_list.html', {'faculties': faculties})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_faculty(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty added successfully.")
            return redirect('faculty_list')
    else:
        form = FacultyForm()

    return render(request, 'faculty/add_faculty.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = FacultyForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=faculty)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Faculty updated successfully.")
            return redirect('faculty_list')
    else:
        form = FacultyForm(instance=faculty)

    return render(request, 'faculty/edit_faculty.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        faculty.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Faculty deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_list")

    return render(request, "faculty/delete_faculty.html", {"faculty": faculty})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def faculty_profile(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    assigned_subjects = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).order_by("name")

    return render(request, "faculty/faculty_profile.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "assigned_subjects": assigned_subjects,
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def assign_subjects_to_faculty(request, pk):
    faculty = get_object_or_404(Faculty, pk=pk)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("name")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_ids = request.POST.getlist("subjects")
        Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).update(faculty=None)
        Subject.objects.filter(id__in=subject_ids).update(faculty=faculty)

        messages.success(request, "Subjects assigned successfully.")
        return redirect("faculty_profile", pk=faculty.id)

    assigned_subject_ids = Subject.objects.filter(faculty=faculty).values_list("id", flat=True)

    return render(request, "faculty/assign_subjects.html", {
        "faculty": faculty,
        "subjects": subjects,
        "assigned_subject_ids": assigned_subject_ids,
    })
5) exams/views.py
Management faculty/admin kare, result/student result view login wale dekh saken:

from django.contrib import messages
from django.db.models import Q
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Exam, Result
from .forms import ExamForm, ResultForm
from subjects.models import Subject


@login_required
def exam_list(request):
    exams = Exam.objects.select_related('course').all().order_by('-date')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_list.html', {'exams': exams})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_add(request):
    form = ExamForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Exam added successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Exam'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_edit(request, pk):
    exam = get_object_or_404(Exam, pk=pk)
    form = ExamForm(request.POST or None, instance=exam)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Exam updated successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Exam'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_delete(request, pk):
    exam = get_object_or_404(Exam, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        exam.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Exam deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_confirm_delete.html', {'exam': exam})


@login_required
def result_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    exam_id = request.GET.get('exam', '')
    subject_id = request.GET.get('subject', '')

    results = Result.objects.select_related('student', 'subject', 'exam').all()

    if query:
        results = results.filter(
            Q(student__name__icontains=query) |
            Q(subject__name__icontains=query) |
            Q(exam__name__icontains=query)
        )

    if exam_id:
        results = results.filter(exam_id=exam_id)

    if subject_id:
        results = results.filter(subject_id=subject_id)

    exams = Exam.objects.all()
    subject_ids = Result.objects.values_list('subject_id', flat=True).distinct()
    subjects = Subject.objects.filter(id__in=subject_ids)

    context = {
        'results': results,
        'exams': exams,
        'subjects': subjects,
        'query': query,
        'selected_exam': exam_id,
        'selected_subject': subject_id,
    }
    return render(request, 'exams/result_list.html', context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_add(request):
    form = ResultForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Result added successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Result'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_edit(request, pk):
    result = get_object_or_404(Result, pk=pk)
    form = ResultForm(request.POST or None, instance=result)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Result updated successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Result'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_delete(request, pk):
    result = get_object_or_404(Result, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        result.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Result deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_confirm_delete.html', {'result': result})


@login_required
def student_result_card(request, student_id):
    results = Result.objects.select_related('student', 'subject', 'exam').filter(student_id=student_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if not results.exists() or results.first().student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    student = None
    total_marks = 0
    count = results.count()
    average_marks = 0
    grade = "F"
    status = "Fail"

    if count > 0:
        student = results.first().student
        total_marks = sum(result.marks for result in results)
        average_marks = total_marks / count

        if average_marks >= 90:
            grade = 'A+'
        elif average_marks >= 80:
            grade = 'A'
        elif average_marks >= 70:
            grade = 'B'
        elif average_marks >= 60:
            grade = 'C'
        elif average_marks >= 50:
            grade = 'D'
        else:
            grade = 'F'

        status = "Pass" if average_marks >= 40 else "Fail"

    context = {
        'student': student,
        'results': results,
        'total_marks': total_marks,
        'average_marks': round(average_marks, 2),
        'grade': grade,
        'status': status,
    }
    return render(request, 'exams/student_result_card.html', context)
6) finance/views.py
Faculty/admin manage karein, student apni fee history dekhe:

from django.contrib import messages
from django.db.models import Q, Sum
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Fee
from .forms import FeeForm


@login_required
def fee_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    status = request.GET.get('status', '')

    fees = Fee.objects.select_related('student').all()

    if query:
        fees = fees.filter(Q(student__name__icontains=query))

    if status:
        fees = fees.filter(status=status)

    context = {
        'fees': fees,
        'query': query,
        'selected_status': status,
        'statuses': ['Paid', 'Pending', 'Partial'],
    }
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_list.html', context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_add(request):
    form = FeeForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record added successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Fee Record'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_edit(request, pk):
    fee = get_object_or_404(Fee, pk=pk)
    form = FeeForm(request.POST or None, instance=fee)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record updated successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Fee Record'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_delete(request, pk):
    fee = get_object_or_404(Fee, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        fee.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_confirm_delete.html', {'fee': fee})


@login_required
def student_fee_history(request, student_id):
    fees = Fee.objects.select_related('student').filter(student_id=student_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if not fees.exists() or fees.first().student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    student = None
    total_fee = 0
    total_paid = 0
    total_pending = 0

    if fees.exists():
        student = fees.first().student
        total_fee = fees.aggregate(total=Sum('total_fee'))['total'] or 0
        total_paid = fees.aggregate(total=Sum('paid_amount'))['total'] or 0
        total_pending = total_fee - total_paid

    context = {
        'student': student,
        'fees': fees,
        'total_fee': total_fee,
        'total_paid': total_paid,
        'total_pending': total_pending,
    }
    return render(request, 'finance/student_fee_history.html', context)

{% extends "base.html" %}
