                    <ul class="list-group">
                        {% for subject in assigned_subjects %}
                            <li class="list-group-item">{{ subject.name }} - {{ subject.course }}</li>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </ul>
                {% else %}
                    <p class="text-muted">No subjects assigned.</p>
                {% endif %}
            </div>

            <div class="mt-3">
                <a href="/faculty/assign-subjects/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-primary">Assign Subjects</a>
                <a href="/faculty/edit/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning">Edit</a>
                <a href="/faculty/delete/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger">Delete</a>
                <a href="/faculty/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
4) Buttons hide/show in templates
Ye already best pattern hai, ise consistently use karo:

{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
    ... management buttons ...
{% endif %}
Student ke liye management buttons hide rahenge.

Templates jahan apply karna hai:

students/student_list.html

students/student_profile.html

faculty/faculty_list.html

faculty/faculty_profile.html

exams/exam_list.html

exams/result_list.html

finance/fee_list.html

5) Forms uniform
Forms ko same Bootstrap card layout me rakho:

add/edit student

add/edit faculty

add/edit exam

add/edit result

add/edit fee

Agar chaho to main next turn me in sab forms ka uniform polished template set bhi de sakta hoon.

Final result after this
Iske baad:

permissions clear ho jayengi

student restricted hoga

faculty manageable access rakhega

admin sab karega

sidebar active dikhega

navbar better hoga

dashboard cleaner hoga

profile pages modern lagenge

forms consistent lagenge

Agar chaho, अगला step me main uniform forms + final template polish pack bhi de deta hoon.


Buttons hide/show in templates ye kaha apply krna h orr kesse 

Bahut important question hai 👍
Buttons hide/show templates me karna hota hai, views me nahi.

Matlab agar user student hai to:

Edit / Delete / Add buttons hide ho jayenge

Agar user faculty ya admin hai to:

management buttons visible honge

Main simple step-by-step samjha raha hoon.

1️⃣ Concept samjho (core logic)
Django template me hum check karte hain:

request.user.role
ya

request.user.is_superuser
Example condition
{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
Matlab:

✔ admin ko show
✔ faculty ko show
❌ student ko hide

2️⃣ Student List page me apply karo
File:

templates/students/student_list.html
Pehle aisa hota hai
<a href="/students/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Student</a>
Isko change karo
{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/students/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Student</a>
{% endif %}
Actions column me bhi apply karo
Before:

<td>
    <a href="/students/profile/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
    <a href="/students/edit/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
    <a href="/students/delete/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
</td>
After:

<td>
    <a href="/students/profile/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>

    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
        <a href="/students/edit/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
        <a href="/students/delete/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
    {% endif %}

</td>
3️⃣ Faculty List page me apply karo
File

templates/faculty/faculty_list.html
Add Faculty button
{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/faculty/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Faculty</a>
{% endif %}
Edit/Delete hide
<td>
    <a href="/faculty/profile/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>

    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
        <a href="/faculty/edit/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
        <a href="/faculty/delete/{{ faculty.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
    {% endif %}

</td>
4️⃣ Exams module me apply karo
File

templates/exams/exam_list.html
Add exam
{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/exams/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Exam</a>
{% endif %}
5️⃣ Result module me
templates/exams/result_list.html
Edit/Delete hide:

{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/exams/results/edit/{{ result.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
<a href="/exams/results/delete/{{ result.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
{% endif %}
6️⃣ Finance module
templates/finance/fee_list.html
{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/finance/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Fee</a>
{% endif %}
7️⃣ Sidebar me bhi hide kar sakte ho
File:

templates/base.html
Example:

{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<a href="/students/list/">Students</a>
<a href="/faculty/">Faculty</a>
<a href="/attendance/">Attendance</a>
{% endif %}
Student ko sirf:

dashboard
results
fees
profile
dikhana chahiye.

8️⃣ Final Result
Student login karega to
❌ Add button nahi
❌ Edit button nahi
❌ Delete button nahi

Sirf:

✔ View
✔ Profile
✔ Results
✔ Fees

Faculty/Admin login karega
✔ Add
✔ Edit
✔ Delete
✔ Manage

🔥 Next jo tumhe karna chahiye
Ab 2 cheezein bachi hain jo project ko professional bana dengi:

1️⃣ Student Dashboard personal
Student login kare to:

My Profile
My Results
My Fees
2️⃣ Excel + PDF export
Examiner ka favourite feature.

Agar chaho to main next step me tumhare project ko full professional ERP banane ke liye

🔥 Student personal dashboard + profile system bhi bana deta hoon.


full code m do jaha use hona h ye 

Bilkul — main tumhe full code de raha hoon jahan-jahan buttons hide/show use hona chahiye.

Isme rule ye rahega:

Admin / Faculty → Add, Edit, Delete, Manage buttons visible

Student → sirf View / allowed pages visible

unauthorized cheezein template level par hide

1) templates/students/student_list.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Student List{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Student List{% endblock %}

{% block content %}

{% if messages %}
    {% for message in messages %}
        <div class="alert alert-success">{{ message }}</div>
    {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

<div class="page-card">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        <h2 class="mb-0">Student List</h2>

        {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
            <a href="/students/add/" class="btn btn-primary">Add Student</a>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <form method="GET" class="row g-2 mb-3">
        <div class="col-md-10">
            <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search Student" value="{{ request.GET.q }}">
        </div>
        <div class="col-auto">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark">Search</button>
        </div>
    </form>

    <div class="table-responsive">
        <table class="table table-bordered table-striped align-middle">
            <thead class="table-dark">
                <tr>
                    <th>ID</th>
                    <th>Photo</th>
                    <th>Name</th>
                    <th>Enrollment No.</th>
                    <th>Course</th>
                    <th>Year</th>
                    <th>Profile</th>
                    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    {% endif %}
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>

            {% for student in students %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ student.id }}</td>

                    <td>
                        {% if student.photo %}
                            <img src="{{ student.photo.url }}" width="60" height="60" alt="Student Photo" class="rounded">
                        {% else %}
                            <span class="text-muted">No Photo</span>
                        {% endif %}
                    </td>

                    <td>{{ student.name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ student.enrollment_number }}</td>
                    <td>{{ student.course }}</td>
                    <td>{{ student.year }}</td>

                    <td>
                        <a href="/students/profile/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                    </td>

                    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <td>
                        <a href="/students/edit/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                        <a href="/students/delete/{{ student.id }}/" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                    </td>
                    {% endif %}
                </tr>
            {% empty %}
                <tr>
                    <td colspan="8" class="text-center">No students found.</td>
                </tr>
            {% endfor %}

            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <nav>
        <ul class="pagination">
            {% if students.has_previous %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">First</a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Previous</a>
                </li>
            {% endif %}

            <li class="page-item disabled">
                <span class="page-link">Page {{ students.number }} of {{ students.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
            </li>

            {% if students.has_next %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Next</a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ students.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}">Last</a>
                </li>
            {% endif %}
        </ul>
    </nav>
</div>

{% endblock %}

                <tr><th>Course</th><td>{{ student.course }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Year</th><td>{{ student.year }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Phone</th><td>{{ student.phone }}</td></tr>

                <th>Total Fee</th>
                <th>Paid Amount</th>
                <th>Pending Amount</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Payment Date</th>
                <th>History</th>
                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <th>Actions</th>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for fee in fees %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ fee.id }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.student }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.total_fee }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.paid_amount }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.pending_amount }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.status }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.payment_date }}</td>
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_fee_history' fee.student.id %}" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                </td>

                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'fee_edit' fee.id %}" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                    <a href="{% url 'fee_delete' fee.id %}" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                </td>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
            {% empty %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="9" class="text-center">No fee records found.</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
{% endblock %}
8) templates/base.html sidebar buttons bhi role-based

<div class="sidebar">

    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
        <div class="sidebar-section-title">Management</div>
        <a href="/students/list/" class="{% if '/students/' in request.path %}active-link{% endif %}">Students</a>

    {% elif request.user.role == 'student' %}

    {% endif %}

    <div class="sidebar-section-title">System</div>
    <a href="/admin/">Admin Panel</a>
    <a href="/accounts/logout/">Logout</a>
</div>

1️⃣ Student Model me relation check
Tumhare students/models.py me ye hona chahiye:

from django.db import models
from django.conf import settings

class Student(models.Model):

    user = models.OneToOneField(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL, on_delete=models.CASCADE)

    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    enrollment_number = models.CharField(max_length=20)
    course = models.CharField(max_length=100)
    year = models.IntegerField()

    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    address = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)

    gender = models.CharField(max_length=10, blank=True, null=True)
    date_of_birth = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)

    admission_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)

    photo = models.ImageField(upload_to="student_photos/", blank=True, null=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
Important:

user = OneToOneField
Isi se student login ka profile connect hota hai.

2️⃣ New view add karo (my profile)
File:

students/views.py
Add this:

@login_required
def my_profile(request):

    if getattr(request.user, "role", None) != "student":
        return render(request, "core/forbidden.html", status=403)

    student = get_object_or_404(Student, user=request.user)

    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {
        "student": student
    })
3️⃣ URL add karo
File:

students/urls.py
Add:

path("my-profile/", views.my_profile, name="my_profile"),
Final example:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [

    path("list/", views.student_list, name="student_list"),
    path("add/", views.add_student, name="add_student"),
    path("edit/<int:pk>/", views.edit_student, name="edit_student"),
    path("delete/<int:pk>/", views.delete_student, name="delete_student"),
    path("profile/<int:pk>/", views.student_profile, name="student_profile"),

    path("my-profile/", views.my_profile, name="my_profile"),

]

5️⃣ Student Dashboard personalize karo
File:

core/views.py
Update dashboard:

@login_required
def dashboard(request):

    if getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "student":

        student = Student.objects.get(user=request.user)

        return render(request, "core/student_dashboard.html", {
            "student": student
        })

    total_students = Student.objects.count()
    total_faculty = Faculty.objects.count()
    total_courses = Course.objects.count()
    total_subjects = Subject.objects.count()
    total_attendance = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_exams = Exam.objects.count()
    total_results = Result.objects.count()
    total_fees = Fee.objects.count()

    context = {
        "student_count": total_students,
        "faculty_count": total_faculty,
        "course_count": total_courses,
        "subject_count": total_subjects,
        "attendance_count": total_attendance,
        "exam_count": total_exams,
        "result_count": total_results,
        "fee_count": total_fees,
    }

    return render(request, "core/dashboard.html", context)

from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.http import HttpResponse
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404

from students.models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm

from decimal import Decimal
from django.shortcuts import render
from students.models import Student
from faculty.models import Faculty
from courses.models import Course
from subjects.models import Subject
from attendance.models import Attendance
from departments.models import Department
from exams.models import Exam, Result
from finance.models import Fee



@login_required
def dashboard(request):
    total_students = Student.objects.count()
    total_faculty = Faculty.objects.count()
    total_courses = Course.objects.count()
    total_subjects = Subject.objects.count()
    total_departments = Department.objects.count()
    total_attendance = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_exams = Exam.objects.count()
    total_results = Result.objects.count()
    total_fees = Fee.objects.count()
    

    fee_records = Fee.objects.all()
    total_pending_fees = Decimal('0.00')

    for fee in fee_records:
        total_pending_fees += fee.pending_amount()

    if request.user.is_superuser:
        dashboard_title = "Admin Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "faculty":
        dashboard_title = "Faculty Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "student":
        dashboard_title = "Student Dashboard"
    else:
        dashboard_title = "Dashboard"

    context = {
        "dashboard_title": dashboard_title,
        "student_count": total_students,
        "faculty_count": total_faculty,
        "course_count": total_courses,
        "subject_count": total_subjects,
        "department_count": total_departments,
        "attendance_count": total_attendance,
        "exam_count": total_exams,
        "result_count": total_results,
        "fee_count": total_fees,
        "pending_fee_total": total_pending_fees,
    }

    return render(request, "core/dashboard.html", context)

   mera core/views.py aisa h kya tumhare jesa krna h ab bhi ..?

Short answer: Nahi, poora change karna zaroori nahi hai, lekin student ke liye personal dashboard chahiye to thoda modify karna padega.
Abhi tumhara dashboard sab roles ke liye same page (dashboard.html) render kar raha hai.

Professional ERP me:

Admin / Faculty → Admin dashboard

Student → Personal dashboard

Isliye thoda sa logic add karna best hai.

Recommended Final core/views.py (modify this)
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import render
from decimal import Decimal

from students.models import Student
from faculty.models import Faculty
from courses.models import Course
from subjects.models import Subject
from attendance.models import Attendance
from departments.models import Department
from exams.models import Exam, Result
from finance.models import Fee


@login_required
def dashboard(request):

    # ---------- STUDENT PERSONAL DASHBOARD ----------
    if getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "student":
        try:
            student = Student.objects.get(user=request.user)
        except Student.DoesNotExist:
            student = None

        return render(request, "core/student_dashboard.html", {
            "student": student
        })


    # ---------- ADMIN / FACULTY DASHBOARD ----------
    total_students = Student.objects.count()
    total_faculty = Faculty.objects.count()
    total_courses = Course.objects.count()
    total_subjects = Subject.objects.count()
    total_departments = Department.objects.count()
    total_attendance = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_exams = Exam.objects.count()
    total_results = Result.objects.count()
    total_fees = Fee.objects.count()

    fee_records = Fee.objects.all()
    total_pending_fees = Decimal('0.00')

    for fee in fee_records:
        total_pending_fees += fee.pending_amount()

    if request.user.is_superuser:
        dashboard_title = "Admin Dashboard"
    elif getattr(request.user, "role", None) == "faculty":
        dashboard_title = "Faculty Dashboard"
    else:
        dashboard_title = "Dashboard"

    context = {
        "dashboard_title": dashboard_title,
        "student_count": total_students,
        "faculty_count": total_faculty,
        "course_count": total_courses,
        "subject_count": total_subjects,
        "department_count": total_departments,
        "attendance_count": total_attendance,
        "exam_count": total_exams,
        "result_count": total_results,
        "fee_count": total_fees,
        "pending_fee_total": total_pending_fees,
    }

    return render(request, "core/dashboard.html", context)

mene abhi admin login kr  rkha h mujhe faculty or student login krna jisse m dekh saku baha kesa dikhta h 

Haan, iske liye tumhe faculty aur student users bana kar login karna hoga.

1. Sabse easy tareeka: Admin panel se users banao
Admin panel kholo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/
Phir:

Accounts → Custom Users
Yahan:

Add user karo

ek faculty user banao

ek student user banao

Example:

Faculty user
username: faculty1

password: 12345faculty

Student user
username: student1

password: 12345student

Important: user create hone ke baad uska role set karo:

faculty user ka role = faculty

student user ka role = student

2. Student model me student user link hona chahiye
Kyuki student dashboard/profile ke liye Student.user = logged in user match hona chahiye.

Admin panel me:

Students
Open karo aur ensure karo:

kisi student record ka user = student1 ho

Example:

Student name: Prateek

user: student1

Agar ye link nahi hoga to student personal profile/dashboard sahi nahi dikhega.

3. Faculty side ke liye
Faculty module me direct user link nahi hai, isliye faculty dashboard dekhne ke liye bas:

CustomUser create karo

role = faculty

Itna kaafi hai.

4. Logout karke test karo
Logout:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/logout/
Phir login page:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/login/
5. Test accounts se login karo
Faculty login
username: faculty1

password: jo set kiya

Dekho:

dashboard title faculty aata hai ya nahi

students/faculty/exams/finance buttons visible hain ya nahi

Student login
username: student1

password: jo set kiya

Dekho:

student dashboard alag aa raha hai ya nahi

add/edit/delete buttons hide ho rahe hain ya nahi

My Profile / Results / Fees dikh rahe hain ya nahi

6. Agar admin se user banana nahi chahte
Terminal se bhi bana sakte ho:

python manage.py shell
from accounts.models import CustomUser

faculty = CustomUser.objects.create_user(
    username='faculty1',
    password='12345faculty',
    role='faculty'
)

student = CustomUser.objects.create_user(
    username='student1',
    password='12345student',
    role='student'
)

print("done")
Phir student model ko link karo:

from students.models import Student
from accounts.models import CustomUser

u = CustomUser.objects.get(username='student1')
s = Student.objects.get(id=1)
s.user = u
s.save()
print("student linked")
Best practical way
Sabse easy:

admin panel se 1 faculty user banao

1 student user banao

student record ko us user se link karo

phir logout/login करके test karo

Agar chaho, main tumhe admin panel me exactly kis-kis field me kya bharna hai step-by-step bhi bata deta hoon.


mujhe  step by step sutdent user ko create kro with define their role 

Bilkul. Yeh lo step-by-step process, jisse tum student user create kar sako aur uska role = student set kar sako.

Main admin panel wala easiest method bata raha hoon.

Step 1: Admin panel kholo
Browser me open karo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/
Apne admin/superuser account se login karo.

Step 2: Custom Users section me jao
Admin panel me tumhe Accounts app ke andar kuch aisa dikhega:

Custom users
Us par click karo.

Step 3: Naya user add karo
Top right me Add Custom User ya Add button hoga. Us par click karo.

Ab form me ye bharo:

Example
Username: student1

Password: student12345

Password confirmation: student12345

Phir Save karo.

Step 4: Role define karo
User save hone ke baad ek detailed edit page khulega.

Wahan ye fields dekhna:

username

first name

last name

email

active

staff

superuser

groups

permissions

role

Ab yahan:

Role field me select karo:
student
Important
Student user ke liye:

is_staff → unchecked rakho

is_superuser → unchecked rakho

Sirf:

Active checked ho

Role = student

Phir Save karo.

Step 5: Existing student record ke saath link karo
Ab admin panel me Students section me jao.

Kisi existing student record ko open karo, for example:

Prateek

ya jo student profile tum dekh rahe ho

Us student form me ek field hogi:

user
Usme dropdown se select karo:

student1
Phir Save karo.

Ye step bahut important hai.
Isi se logged-in student ka profile uske data se connect hoga.

Step 6: Logout karo
Ab admin se logout karo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/logout/
Step 7: Student user se login karo
Login page kholo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/login/
Ab login karo:

Username: student1

Password: student12345

Step 8: Test karo
Login ke baad check karo:

Dashboard
http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/
Yahan ideally student dashboard ya restricted dashboard dikhna chahiye.

My profile
http://127.0.0.1:8000/students/my-profile/
Yahan us student ka profile dikhna chahiye.

Student restrictions
Check karo:

Add Student button hidden

Edit/Delete buttons hidden

Faculty management pages blocked

Finance/Results sirf allowed view mode me

Quick recap
Sequence ye hai:

Admin login

Custom User create

Role = student set

Student record me user = student1 link

Logout

Student login

Test dashboard/profile

Example ready-made values
Use these exact values:

User
username: student1

password: student12345

role: student

Student record
name: Prateek

user: student1

Common mistake
Sabse common galti hoti hai:

user bana diya

role bhi set kar diya

but student record ke user field me link nahi kiya

Agar link nahi hoga to:

my profile kaam nahi karega

student-specific dashboard sahi nahi dikhega

Agar chaho, next message me main faculty user create karne ka bhi same step-by-step process de deta hoon.

Uploaded image
Uploaded image
isme mujhe role nhi doikh rha kese krna h ab 

Tumhare screenshots dekh ke clear ho gaya hai ki admin panel me “role” field show hi nahi ho rahi. Iska matlab hai:

👉 Tumhara CustomUser model admin me properly register nahi hua
ya
👉 role field admin form me include nahi hai.

Isko fix karne ke liye 2 step karne padenge. 🔧

Step 1 — Check CustomUser model
Open karo:

accounts/models.py
Ensure karo ki model aisa ho:

from django.contrib.auth.models import AbstractUser
from django.db import models


class CustomUser(AbstractUser):

    ROLE_CHOICES = (
        ('admin', 'Admin'),
        ('faculty', 'Faculty'),
        ('student', 'Student'),
    )

    role = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=ROLE_CHOICES)
Agar role field hi nahi hai to admin me kabhi nahi dikhega.

Step 2 — Admin me register karo role field
Open karo:

accounts/admin.py
Usme ye code hona chahiye:

from django.contrib import admin
from .models import CustomUser


@admin.register(CustomUser)
class CustomUserAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):

    list_display = (
        'username',
        'email',
        'role',
        'is_staff',
    )

    fieldsets = (
        ("Login Info", {
            "fields": ("username", "password")
        }),

        ("Personal Info", {
            "fields": ("first_name", "last_name", "email")
        }),

        ("Role", {
            "fields": ("role",)
        }),

        ("Permissions", {
            "fields": ("is_active", "is_staff", "is_superuser", "groups", "user_permissions")
        }),

        ("Important dates", {
            "fields": ("last_login", "date_joined")
        }),
    )
Step 3 — Server restart
Run karo:

CTRL + C
phir:

python manage.py runserver
Step 4 — Admin panel refresh
Open again:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/accounts/customuser/
Ab jab user open karoge to Role dropdown dikhega:

Role:
Admin
Faculty
Student
Step 5 — Student role set karo
Example:

Username : vihaan
Role : student
Save.

Result
Ab login karne par:

Student user:

Dashboard → limited
Students → only profile
Finance → maybe view only
Faculty → hidden
Faculty user:

Students manage
Attendance manage
Results manage
Admin:

Everything
Important extra check
Tumhari settings.py me typo hai.

Abhi likha hai:

AAUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.CustomUser'
Isko correct karo:

AUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.CustomUser'
Ye bahut important hai.

Agar chaho to main next ye bhi bana sakta hoon

auto redirect dashboard

student dashboard alag

faculty dashboard alag

[07/Mar/2026 19:54:18] "GET /accounts/logout/ HTTP/1.1" 405 0

[07/Mar/2026 19:54:20] "GET /accounts/logout/ HTTP/1.1" 405 0
Method Not Allowed (GET): /accounts/logout/
[07/Mar/2026 19:54:21] "GET /accounts/logout/ HTTP/1.1" 405 0

Sab sahi chal raha hai — bas logout issue aa raha hai.

Problem
Ye line bata rahi hai:

Method Not Allowed (GET): /accounts/logout/
Django 6 me django.contrib.auth.urls ka logout view GET accept nahi karta, wo POST chahta hai.

Isliye jab tum sidebar me simple link use kar rahe ho:

<a href="/accounts/logout/">Logout</a>
to 405 aa raha hai.

Correct fix
Logout ko POST form button banana hoga.

templates/base.html me
Jahan abhi ye hai:

<a href="/accounts/logout/">Logout</a>
Usko hatao aur ye laga do:

<form method="post" action="/accounts/logout/" style="margin: 0; padding: 0 20px;">
    {% csrf_token %}
    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-link text-decoration-none p-0" style="color:#dbe4f0;">
        Logout
    </button>
</form>
Better styled version
Agar tum chahte ho ye sidebar link jaisa hi dikhe, to ye use karo:

<form method="post" action="/accounts/logout/" style="margin:0;">
    {% csrf_token %}
    <button type="submit"
            style="color:#dbe4f0; text-decoration:none; display:block; padding:12px 20px; font-size:15px; border:none; background:none; width:100%; text-align:left;">
        Logout
    </button>
</form>
base.html ke System section ka final safe code
<div class="sidebar-section-title">System</div>
<a href="/admin/">Admin Panel</a>

<form method="post" action="/accounts/logout/" style="margin:0;">
    {% csrf_token %}
    <button type="submit"
            style="color:#dbe4f0; text-decoration:none; display:block; padding:12px 20px; font-size:15px; border:none; background:none; width:100%; text-align:left;">
        Logout
    </button>
</form>
Iske baad
base.html save karo

page refresh karo

Logout button click karo

Ab 405 nahi aayega.

Extra improvement
Agar logout ke baad redirect set karna hai, settings.py me ye hona chahiye:

LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
Ya agar home page par bhejna hai:

LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/'
Current status
Ab:

custom user working

role save ho raha hai

admin panel working

student photo working

bas logout ko GET se POST banana tha

Agar chaho, next main tumhe base.html ka fully updated final polished version de deta hoon jisme logout bhi proper ho aur student/faculty/admin sidebar bhi clean ho.

Ab sabse bada issue ye hai:

Problem
Login ke baad ye aa raha hai:

Not Found: /accounts/redirect/
Matlab LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL to set hai, but /accounts/redirect/ ka route bana nahi hai.

Fix karne ke exact steps
1) accounts/views.py
Isme ye view add karo:

from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import redirect


@login_required
def redirect_after_login(request):
    if request.user.is_superuser:
        return redirect('dashboard')

    role = getattr(request.user, 'role', None)

    if role == 'faculty':
        return redirect('dashboard')
    elif role == 'student':
        return redirect('dashboard')
    else:
        return redirect('dashboard')
2) accounts/urls.py
Agar file nahi hai to banao. Agar hai to isme ye route add karo:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('redirect/', views.redirect_after_login, name='redirect_after_login'),
]
3) config/urls.py
Ensure ye line ho:

path('accounts/', include('accounts.urls')),
Tumhare case me likely abhi ye hai:

path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
To dono rakhne honge.

Final correct pattern:
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
    path('accounts/', include('accounts.urls')),

    path('', include('core.urls')),
    path('students/', include('students.urls')),
    path('faculty/', include('faculty.urls')),
    path('courses/', include('courses.urls')),
    path('subjects/', include('subjects.urls')),
    path('attendance/', include('attendance.urls')),
    path('departments/', include('departments.urls')),
    path('exams/', include('exams.urls')),
    path('finance/', include('finance.urls')),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)
4) settings.py
Ye line thik honi chahiye:

LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
Aur logout:

LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
Admin logout wala 403 kyun aaya
Ye line:

Forbidden (CSRF token from POST incorrect.): /admin/logout/
Ye admin panel ka separate logout hai.
Normal hai agar CSRF mismatch hua. Isko ignore kar sakte ho.

Best practice:

admin panel se logout admin ke top-right logout se karo

ya normal app ke logout button se app logout karo

Ab kya karo
accounts/views.py me view add karo

accounts/urls.py me redirect route add karo

config/urls.py me accounts.urls include karo

server restart karo

python manage.py runserver
Phir:

student/faculty login karo

ab /accounts/redirect/ 404 nahi aayega

Expected behavior after fix
Faculty login
→ /dashboard/

Student login
→ /dashboard/

Baad me chaho to student ko directly personal dashboard par aur faculty ko management dashboard par aur clean bana sakte hain.

Agar chaho, next message me main tumhare liye accounts/views.py + accounts/urls.py ka final ready code ek saath de deta hoon.

Haan, screenshot se 2 issues clear dikh rahe hain:

1. Logout ke baad login page 3 baar repeat ho raha hai
Ye usually tab hota hai jab login template galat jagah rakha ho ya base.html/template blocks me duplication ho.

2. Student login likely isliye nahi ho raha kyunki
Tumhara settings me ye hai:

LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
LOGIN_URL = '/login/'
Lekin terminal me logout ke baad open ho raha hai:

GET /login/ HTTP/1.1
Aur Django auth ka normal login route hota hai:

/accounts/login/
Matlab login URLs mixed ho gaye hain.

Exact fix
Step 1: settings.py ko correct karo
Is block ko:

LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
LOGIN_URL = '/login/'
replace karke ye kar do:

LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
LOGIN_URL = '/accounts/login/'
Important
LOGIN_URL = '/login/' ❌
Ye galat hai tumhare current setup ke liye.

LOGIN_URL = '/accounts/login/' ✅
Ye sahi hai.

Step 2: accounts/views.py me redirect view banao
Agar abhi nahi banaya, to ye add karo:

from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import redirect


@login_required
def redirect_after_login(request):
    if request.user.is_superuser:
        return redirect('dashboard')

    role = getattr(request.user, 'role', None)

    if role == 'faculty':
        return redirect('dashboard')
    elif role == 'student':
        return redirect('dashboard')
    else:
        return redirect('dashboard')
Step 3: accounts/urls.py
Ye file aisi honi chahiye:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('redirect/', views.redirect_after_login, name='redirect_after_login'),
]
Step 4: config/urls.py
Ensure ye dono includes present hon:

path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
path('accounts/', include('accounts.urls')),
Final relevant part:

from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import path, include
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),

    path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
    path('accounts/', include('accounts.urls')),

    path('', include('core.urls')),
    path('students/', include('students.urls')),
    path('faculty/', include('faculty.urls')),
    path('courses/', include('courses.urls')),
    path('subjects/', include('subjects.urls')),
    path('attendance/', include('attendance.urls')),
    path('departments/', include('departments.urls')),
    path('exams/', include('exams.urls')),
    path('finance/', include('finance.urls')),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)
Ab login page 3 baar kyun dikh raha hai
Ye almost pakka template issue hai.

Check 1: templates/registration/login.html
Django auth login ke liye correct file name hona chahiye:

templates/registration/login.html
Agar tumne login template kisi aur jagah banaya hai aur wo include/extend weird ho raha hai, duplication aa sakti hai.

Step 5: templates/registration/login.html ko simple clean code se replace karo
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>College ERP Login</title>
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body {
            background: #1f2937;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .login-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 30px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 420px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="login-card">
    <h2 class="text-center mb-4">College ERP Login</h2>

    {% if form.errors %}
        <div class="alert alert-danger">
            Invalid username or password.
        </div>
    {% endif %}

    <form method="post">
        {% csrf_token %}

        <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Username</label>
            {{ form.username }}
        </div>

        <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
            {{ form.password }}
        </div>

        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">Login</button>
    </form>
</div>

</body>
</html>
Step 6: form styling improve karni hai
Agar inputs ugly dikh rahe hain, to login form ko custom widget ke saath bhi bana sakte hain, but abhi pehle basic working karte hain.

CTRL + C
python manage.py runserver

Browser me ye open karo:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/login/
Not:

role = student

abhi bhi bhai image ki trha hi aa rha h 

Samajh gaya — abhi bhi login page 3 baar repeat ho raha hai, matlab issue sirf URL ka nahi hai, login template ka structure hi galat hai.

Ye usually tab hota hai jab:

login.html me 3 cards manually bane hue hain, ya

template base.html ko extend kar raha hai aur content repeat ho raha hai, ya

same form multiple baar paste ho gaya hai

Ab guess nahi karte — direct fix karte hain.

Exact fix
Step 1: Ye file dhundo
Is path par file honi chahiye:

templates/registration/login.html
Agar ye file nahi hai, to banao.

Step 2: Us file ka pura content hata do
Aur sirf ye exact code rakho:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>College ERP Login</title>
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            background: #1f2937;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        .login-card {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 420px;
            background: #ffffff;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
        }

        .login-card h2 {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .login-card input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px 14px;
            border: 1px solid #ced4da;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .login-card button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: #0d6efd;
            color: white;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .login-card button:hover {
            background: #0b5ed7;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="login-card">
        <h2>College ERP Login</h2>

        {% if form.errors %}
            <div class="alert alert-danger">
                Invalid username or password.
            </div>
        {% endif %}

        <form method="post">
            {% csrf_token %}
            {{ form.username }}
            {{ form.password }}
            <button type="submit">Login</button>
        </form>
    </div>

</body>
</html>
Important
Is file me:

{% extends "base.html" %} nahi hona chahiye

{% block content %} nahi hona chahiye

same form 2–3 baar nahi hona chahiye

Login page ko standalone rakho.

Step 3: settings.py me ye 3 lines confirm karo
LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
LOGIN_URL = '/accounts/login/'
Step 4: accounts/views.py
Ye view hona chahiye:

from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import redirect


@login_required
def redirect_after_login(request):
    return redirect('dashboard')
Step 5: accounts/urls.py
Ye hona chahiye:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('redirect/', views.redirect_after_login, name='redirect_after_login'),
]
Step 6: config/urls.py
Ye dono lines honi chahiye:

path('accounts/', include('django.contrib.auth.urls')),
path('accounts/', include('accounts.urls')),

Ab kaafi cheezein sahi ho gayi hain. Logs se clear hai:

login work kar raha hai

/accounts/redirect/ work kar raha hai

dashboard open ho raha hai

permission system bhi kaam kar raha hai

Ab jo bache hue issues hain, wo ye hain:

1. /students/profile/1/ par 403
Ye sahi behavior hai.

Tum student user se login ho, aur code ye check kar raha hai ki student sirf apna hi profile dekh sake. Agar logged-in student ka linked Student record id 1 nahi hai, to /students/profile/1/ forbidden aayega.

Matlab:

ya to current student user ka linked student record id kuch aur hai

ya Student.user mapping galat hai

2. /students/my-profile/ par 404
Iska matlab my_profile view/URL abhi add nahi hua.

3. Finance/result pages me 403
Ye bhi expected hai agar tum kisi aur student ka data khol rahe ho.

Ab exact final fix
A. students/views.py me my_profile add karo
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.core.paginator import Paginator
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.db.models import Q

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Student
from .forms import StudentForm


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def student_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q')

    if query:
        student_qs = Student.objects.filter(
            Q(name__icontains=query) |
            Q(enrollment_number__icontains=query) |
            Q(course__icontains=query)
        ).order_by('id')
    else:
        student_qs = Student.objects.all().order_by('id')

    paginator = Paginator(student_qs, 5)
    page_number = request.GET.get('page')
    students = paginator.get_page(page_number)

    return render(request, 'students/student_list.html', {'students': students})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_student(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student added successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
    else:
        form = StudentForm()

    return render(request, 'students/add_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = StudentForm(request.POST, request.FILES, instance=student)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Student updated successfully.")
            return redirect('student_list')
    else:
        form = StudentForm(instance=student)

    return render(request, 'students/edit_student.html', {'form': form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_student(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        student.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Student deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("student_list")

    return render(request, "students/delete_student.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def student_profile(request, pk):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=pk)

    if not request.user.is_superuser and getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student':
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {"student": student})


@login_required
def my_profile(request):
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) != 'student':
        return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    student = get_object_or_404(Student, user=request.user)
    return render(request, "students/student_profile.html", {"student": student})
B. students/urls.py me my-profile add karo
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('list/', views.student_list, name='student_list'),
    path('add/', views.add_student, name='add_student'),
    path('edit/<int:pk>/', views.edit_student, name='edit_student'),
    path('delete/<int:pk>/', views.delete_student, name='delete_student'),
    path('profile/<int:pk>/', views.student_profile, name='student_profile'),
    path('my-profile/', views.my_profile, name='my_profile'),
]

student side jb khulti h usme sbki hi fees dikhti h naki uss i student ki or sbka hi result 

Haan, ye abhi permission/view logic ka issue hai.

Problem
Student login par:

fee_list me sab students ki fees aa rahi hain

result_list me sab students ke results aa rahe hain

Student ko sirf apna data dekhna chahiye.

Faculty/Admin:

sab records dekh sakte hain

Student:

sirf apne records

Exact fix
1) finance/views.py
fee_list ko is code se replace karo:

from django.contrib import messages
from django.db.models import Q, Sum
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Fee
from .forms import FeeForm
from students.models import Student


@login_required
def fee_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    status = request.GET.get('status', '')

    fees = Fee.objects.select_related('student').all()

    # Student sirf apni fee records dekhe
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        try:
            student = Student.objects.get(user=request.user)
            fees = fees.filter(student=student)
        except Student.DoesNotExist:
            fees = Fee.objects.none()
    else:
        # Faculty/Admin ke liye search/filter
        if query:
            fees = fees.filter(Q(student__name__icontains=query))

        if status:
            fees = fees.filter(status=status)

    context = {
        'fees': fees,
        'query': query,
        'selected_status': status,
        'statuses': ['Paid', 'Pending', 'Partial'],
    }
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_list.html', context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_add(request):
    form = FeeForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record added successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Fee Record'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_edit(request, pk):
    fee = get_object_or_404(Fee, pk=pk)
    form = FeeForm(request.POST or None, instance=fee)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record updated successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Fee Record'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def fee_delete(request, pk):
    fee = get_object_or_404(Fee, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        fee.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Fee record deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('fee_list')
    return render(request, 'finance/fee_confirm_delete.html', {'fee': fee})


@login_required
def student_fee_history(request, student_id):
    fees = Fee.objects.select_related('student').filter(student_id=student_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if not fees.exists() or fees.first().student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    student = None
    total_fee = 0
    total_paid = 0
    total_pending = 0

    if fees.exists():
        student = fees.first().student
        total_fee = fees.aggregate(total=Sum('total_fee'))['total'] or 0
        total_paid = fees.aggregate(total=Sum('paid_amount'))['total'] or 0
        total_pending = total_fee - total_paid

    context = {
        'student': student,
        'fees': fees,
        'total_fee': total_fee,
        'total_paid': total_paid,
        'total_pending': total_pending,
    }
    return render(request, 'finance/student_fee_history.html', context)
2) exams/views.py
result_list ko is code se replace karo:

from django.contrib import messages
from django.db.models import Q
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from core.decorators import role_required
from .models import Exam, Result
from .forms import ExamForm, ResultForm
from subjects.models import Subject
from students.models import Student


@login_required
def exam_list(request):
    exams = Exam.objects.select_related('course').all().order_by('-date')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_list.html', {'exams': exams})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_add(request):
    form = ExamForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Exam added successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Exam'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_edit(request, pk):
    exam = get_object_or_404(Exam, pk=pk)
    form = ExamForm(request.POST or None, instance=exam)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Exam updated successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Exam'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def exam_delete(request, pk):
    exam = get_object_or_404(Exam, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        exam.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Exam deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('exam_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/exam_confirm_delete.html', {'exam': exam})


@login_required
def result_list(request):
    query = request.GET.get('q', '')
    exam_id = request.GET.get('exam', '')
    subject_id = request.GET.get('subject', '')

    results = Result.objects.select_related('student', 'subject', 'exam').all()

    # Student sirf apne results dekhe
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        try:
            student = Student.objects.get(user=request.user)
            results = results.filter(student=student)
        except Student.DoesNotExist:
            results = Result.objects.none()
    else:
        if query:
            results = results.filter(
                Q(student__name__icontains=query) |
                Q(subject__name__icontains=query) |
                Q(exam__name__icontains=query)
            )

        if exam_id:
            results = results.filter(exam_id=exam_id)

        if subject_id:
            results = results.filter(subject_id=subject_id)

    exams = Exam.objects.all()
    subject_ids = Result.objects.values_list('subject_id', flat=True).distinct()
    subjects = Subject.objects.filter(id__in=subject_ids)

    context = {
        'results': results,
        'exams': exams,
        'subjects': subjects,
        'query': query,
        'selected_exam': exam_id,
        'selected_subject': subject_id,
    }
    return render(request, 'exams/result_list.html', context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_add(request):
    form = ResultForm(request.POST or None)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Result added successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Add Result'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_edit(request, pk):
    result = get_object_or_404(Result, pk=pk)
    form = ResultForm(request.POST or None, instance=result)
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
        messages.success(request, "Result updated successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_form.html', {'form': form, 'title': 'Edit Result'})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def result_delete(request, pk):
    result = get_object_or_404(Result, pk=pk)
    if request.method == 'POST':
        result.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Result deleted successfully.")
        return redirect('result_list')
    return render(request, 'exams/result_confirm_delete.html', {'result': result})


@login_required
def student_result_card(request, student_id):
    results = Result.objects.select_related('student', 'subject', 'exam').filter(student_id=student_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if not results.exists() or results.first().student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    student = None
    total_marks = 0
    count = results.count()
    average_marks = 0
    grade = "F"
    status = "Fail"

    if count > 0:
        student = results.first().student
        total_marks = sum(result.marks for result in results)
        average_marks = total_marks / count

        if average_marks >= 90:
            grade = 'A+'
        elif average_marks >= 80:
            grade = 'A'
        elif average_marks >= 70:
            grade = 'B'
        elif average_marks >= 60:
            grade = 'C'
        elif average_marks >= 50:
            grade = 'D'
        else:
            grade = 'F'

        status = "Pass" if average_marks >= 40 else "Fail"

    context = {
        'student': student,
        'results': results,
        'total_marks': total_marks,
        'average_marks': round(average_marks, 2),
        'grade': grade,
        'status': status,
    }
    return render(request, 'exams/student_result_card.html', context)
3) Templates me search/filter hide karo for student

    </div>

    <div class="col-md-4">
        <select name="status" class="form-select">
            <option value="">All Status</option>
            {% for s in statuses %}
                <option value="{{ s }}" {% if selected_status == s %}selected{% endif %}>{{ s }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-2">

    </div>

{% endif %}
templates/exams/result_list.html
Filter form bhi faculty/admin ke liye hi:

{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<form method="get" class="row g-3 mb-4">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search student / subject / exam" value="{{ query }}">
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <select name="exam" class="form-select">
            <option value="">All Exams</option>
            {% for exam in exams %}
                <option value="{{ exam.id }}" {% if selected_exam == exam.id|stringformat:"s" %}selected{% endif %}>
                    {{ exam.name }}
                </option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
    </div>

        <select name="subject" class="form-select">
            <option value="">All Subjects</option>
            {% for subject in subjects %}
                <option value="{{ subject.id }}" {% if selected_subject == subject.id|stringformat:"s" %}selected{% endif %}>
                    {{ subject.name }}
                </option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-2">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark w-100">Filter</button>
    </div>
</form>
{% endif %}
Final result
After this:

Student login
/finance/list/ → sirf apni fees

/exams/results/list/ → sirf apne results

Faculty/Admin login
sab students ki fees/results

Agar chaho, next message me main fee_list.html aur result_list.html ka full final code bhi de deta hoon with these conditions already added.


3 se pure codes bhejoo

Bilkul — point 3 se pure final codes neeche de raha hoon.

Isme main de raha hoon:

templates/finance/fee_list.html

templates/exams/result_list.html

Inme:

student ko sirf apna data

faculty/admin ko filter + full management

student ke liye add/edit/delete hidden

student ke liye search/filter hidden

1) templates/finance/fee_list.html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}Fee List{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Fee List{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
            <h2>Fee List</h2>
        {% else %}
            <h2>My Fees</h2>
        {% endif %}

        {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
            <a href="{% url 'fee_add' %}" class="btn btn-primary">Add Fee</a>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
    <form method="get" class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-6">
            <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control" placeholder="Search student" value="{{ query }}">
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <select name="status" class="form-select">
                <option value="">All Status</option>
                {% for s in statuses %}
                    <option value="{{ s }}" {% if selected_status == s %}selected{% endif %}>{{ s }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-2">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark w-100">Filter</button>
        </div>
    </form>
    {% endif %}

    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped align-middle">
        <thead class="table-dark">
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>Student</th>
                <th>Total Fee</th>
                <th>Paid Amount</th>
                <th>Pending Amount</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Payment Date</th>
                <th>History</th>
                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <th>Actions</th>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for fee in fees %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ fee.id }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.student }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.total_fee }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.paid_amount }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.pending_amount }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.status }}</td>
                <td>{{ fee.payment_date }}</td>
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'student_fee_history' fee.student.id %}" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                </td>

                {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                <td>
                    <a href="{% url 'fee_edit' fee.id %}" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                    <a href="{% url 'fee_delete' fee.id %}" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                </td>
                {% endif %}
            </tr>
            {% empty %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}9{% else %}8{% endif %}" class="text-center">
                    No fee records found.
                </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
{% endblock %}

Faculty login nhi ho pa rhi h or uska dasboard dekhna h mujhe 

Theek, faculty login ke liye ye step-by-step follow karo.

1. Admin panel me faculty user banao
Open:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/
Phir:

Accounts

Custom Users

Add Custom User

Fill:

username: faculty1
password: faculty12345
Save.

2. Is user ka role set karo
Ab jo user bana hai usko open karo aur ye check/set karo:

role = faculty

is_active = checked

is_staff = unchecked rakh sakte ho normal app login ke liye

is_superuser = unchecked

Phir Save.

3. Faculty model alag hai, lekin login ke liye zaroori nahi
Tumhare project me Faculty model me user field nahi hai, isliye faculty login ke liye bas CustomUser me role faculty hona kaafi hai.

Matlab faculty dashboard dekhne ke liye Faculty table me alag record hona helpful hai, but login ke liye required nahi.

4. Normal login page se login karo
Yahan jao:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/accounts/login/
Use:

username: faculty1
password: faculty12345
5. Login ke baad kya open hona chahiye
Agar sab sahi hai to:

/accounts/redirect/ -> /dashboard/
Aur dashboard me top par ya title me:

Faculty Dashboard
Dikhna chahiye.

6. Faculty dashboard actually kaisa dikhega
Tumhare current setup me faculty ke liye:

Dashboard

Students

Faculty

Courses

Departments

Subjects

Attendance

Exams

Results

Finance

ye links/sidebar visible honi chahiye.

Student wale limited links nahi aane chahiye.

7. Agar login fail ho rahi hai to 4 common reasons
A. Password galat
Admin me user open karke “change password” se naya set kar do.

B. role save nahi hua
Custom User record open karke confirm karo:

role = faculty
C. is_active off hai
Ensure active checked ho.

D. Galat URL use kar rahe ho
Use only:

/accounts/login/
/login/ ya admin login mat use karo.

8. Terminal se faculty user banana ho to
Agar admin panel se issue ho raha hai, shell se direct banao:

python manage.py shell
from accounts.models import CustomUser

u = CustomUser.objects.create_user(
    username='faculty1',
    password='faculty12345',
    role='faculty',
    is_active=True
)

print(u.username, u.role)
Phir exit karke login karo.

9. Agar dekhna hai user properly bana ya nahi
Shell me:

python manage.py shell
from accounts.models import CustomUser
print(CustomUser.objects.filter(username='faculty1').values('username', 'role', 'is_active'))
Expected something like:

<QuerySet [{'username': 'faculty1', 'role': 'faculty', 'is_active': True}]>
10. Agar faculty login ke baad bhi student dashboard aa raha ho
To problem role me hai. Check:

from accounts.models import CustomUser
u = CustomUser.objects.get(username='faculty1')
print(u.role)
Ye faculty hi aana chahiye.

Agar chaho, agle message me main tumhe faculty user create + test + dashboard verify ka exact admin-panel walkthrough image-style steps me de deta hoon.

POST /accounts/login/ HTTP/1.1" 200 ka matlab hai login successful nahi hui.

Agar login successful hoti, to usually ye aata:

POST /accounts/login/ ... 302
GET /accounts/redirect/ ... 302
GET /dashboard/ ... 200
Iska matlab ab kya check karna hai
1. Username/password galat ho sakta hai
Admin panel me jao:

/admin/accounts/customuser/
Faculty user kholo aur Change password karke naya password set karo.

Example:

username: faculty1

password: faculty12345

Phir isi se login try karo.

2. User active hona chahiye
Faculty user open karke check karo:

Active ✅ checked

Role = faculty ✅

Superuser ❌ unchecked

Staff status optional hai, normal app login ke liye zaroori nahi

3. Login form error dekhna
templates/registration/login.html me ye block hona chahiye:

{% if form.errors %}
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        Invalid username or password.
    </div>
{% endif %}
Agar ye hai, to login fail hone par page par error dikh jayega.

4. Shell se verify karo faculty user hai bhi ya nahi
Terminal me:

python manage.py shell
Phir:

from accounts.models import CustomUser
print(CustomUser.objects.filter(username='faculty1').values('username', 'role', 'is_active'))
Expected output something like:

<QuerySet [{'username': 'faculty1', 'role': 'faculty', 'is_active': True}]>
Agar empty aaye, user bana hi nahi.

5. Fastest fix: shell se naya faculty user banao
Agar doubt hai existing user par, to naya bana do:

python manage.py shell
from accounts.models import CustomUser

u = CustomUser.objects.create_user(
    username='faculty2',
    password='faculty12345',
    role='faculty',
    is_active=True
)

print(u.username, u.role, u.is_active)
Phir login karo:

/accounts/login/
with:

username: faculty2

password: faculty12345

Important
Faculty login ke liye Faculty table me alag row hona useful hai, but login fail hone ka reason usually wo nahi hota.
Login fail mostly:

wrong password

inactive user

user exist nahi karta

Ab best next step
Admin panel me faculty user ka password reset karo, role confirm karo, phir login try karo.
Agar phir bhi issue aaye, accounts/admin.py aur templates/registration/login.html ka code bhejo.


sahi password or user dalne pr invalid bata rha h 

Theek — ab issue clear hai:

Problem
Sahi username/password dene par bhi login page “invalid” bol raha hai.
Iska matlab usually inme se koi ek hota hai:

user ka password actually woh nahi hai jo tum samajh rahe ho

user inactive hai

auth system wrong user model use kar raha hai

login form credentials receive kar raha hai, but authenticate fail ho raha hai

Ab guess nahi, direct test karte hain.

Step 1: shell me direct authenticate test karo
Terminal me run karo:

python manage.py shell
Phir ye exact commands chalao:

from django.contrib.auth import authenticate
from accounts.models import CustomUser

print(CustomUser.objects.filter(username='faculty1').values('username', 'role', 'is_active'))

user = authenticate(username='faculty1', password='faculty12345')
print(user)
Result ka matlab
Agar print(user) output de:
faculty1
To username/password sahi hai, problem login page/template ya redirect side me hai.

Agar print(user) de:
None
To password ya user auth level par galat hai.

Step 2: password ko force reset karo shell se
Admin panel par depend mat karo. Shell se direct set karo.

from accounts.models import CustomUser

u = CustomUser.objects.get(username='faculty1')
u.set_password('faculty12345')
u.is_active = True
u.role = 'faculty'
u.save()

print("done")
Phir dubara authenticate test karo:

from django.contrib.auth import authenticate
user = authenticate(username='faculty1', password='faculty12345')
print(user)
Agar ab user print ho jaye, to login chalna chahiye.

Step 3: login template me hidden mistake to nahi
Tumhara templates/registration/login.html simple hona chahiye.
Ye exact code rakho:

Step 4: settings.py confirm karo
Ye lines exactly aisi honi chahiye:

AUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.CustomUser'
LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/redirect/'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = '/accounts/login/'
LOGIN_URL = '/accounts/login/'
Agar AAUTH_USER_MODEL likha hoga ya duplicate AUTH_USER_MODEL hoga to issue aa sakta hai.

Step 5: authentication backends check karo
settings.py me agar tumne custom backend kuch dala hai aur galat hai, to login fail ho sakti hai.

Normally kuch bhi special nahi hona chahiye.
Agar AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS block hai, mujhe bhejo.
Agar nahi hai, default thik hai.

Step 6: fastest guaranteed fix — naya faculty user banao
Kabhi-kabhi old user corrupt/confused ho jata hai. Naya bana do:

    username='facultytest',

Phir test:

from django.contrib.auth import authenticate

Agar ye work kare, to login page par bhi ye user work karega.

Best next step
Abhi shell me ye 2 cheezein run karke output bhejo:

Us output se exact root cause turant pakad lenge.

Option 1: Shell se naya faculty user banao

from students.models import Student
