kya isme faculty or admin same kaam mrenge koi limitation nhi lgyi like student ki trha

Haan — abhi ke current setup me admin aur faculty lagbhag same kaam kar rahe hain.
Student par restriction lag gayi hai, but faculty aur admin ke beech abhi strong limitation nahi lagi.

Abhi current behavior kya hai
Student
restricted

sirf apna profile/result/fees

add/edit/delete hidden

unauthorized pages par forbidden

Faculty
students manage

faculty pages access

exams/results manage

finance manage

attendance/courses etc. access

Admin
superuser hone ki wajah se sab access

basically faculty se bhi zyada, but app-level views me abhi mostly same permissions mil rahi hain

Matlab simple answer
Haan, abhi faculty aur admin almost same kaam kar rahe hain.
Student hi properly limited hai.

Kya ye theek hai?
Final year project ke liye
Haan, chal sakta hai.
Bahut saare college ERP projects me:

Admin + Faculty = management roles

Student = restricted role

Ye acceptable hai.

Professional version ke liye
Agar tum aur strong banana chahte ho, to admin aur faculty me ye differences la sakte ho:

Admin only
faculty add/edit/delete

department add/edit/delete

course add/edit/delete

subject assign final control

user/role management

full reports

Faculty
attendance manage

results manage

student view/edit limited

exam management

apne assigned subjects dekhna

fees maybe view only, not delete

Mere hisaab se best next upgrade
Ab tumhare liye 2 options hain:

Option A — current state rehne do
Admin + Faculty similar

Student restricted

project submission ke liye enough

Option B — proper admin/faculty separation karo
Ye thoda better lagega viva/project demo me.

Agar admin/faculty separate karna hai to simple rule ye rakho
Admin only pages
faculty add/edit/delete

courses add/edit/delete

departments add/edit/delete

subject assignment

full finance management

Faculty pages
attendance

exams

results

student list/profile

maybe fee view only

Recommended
Mere hisaab se ab:

student restrictions done

next admin vs faculty separation karna worth it hai

Kyuki ye project ko aur mature bana dega.

Agar chaho, next message me main tumhe admin vs faculty final permission matrix + full decorator/template changes de deta hoon.


Attendance duplication ka risk

Attendance model me ab student + subject + date uniqueness enforce nahi ho rahi.

Aur mark_class_attendance() हर बार direct Attendance.objects.create(...) karta hai.

Matlab:

same student

same subject

same date

ke multiple duplicate attendance records ban sakte hain.

ERP me ye dangerous hai, kyunki attendance report galat ho sakti hai.   

Bilkul sahi pakda tumne — ye real ERP-level bug hai.

Agar attendance me same:

student

subject

date

ke multiple rows ban jayen, to:

attendance percentage galat ho jayega

duplicate reports aayengi

present/absent count wrong ho jayega

faculty galti se same class dobara mark kar dega

Ye definitely fix karna chahiye.

Best fix
Isko 2 levels par fix karo:

1. Database level constraint
Model me unique_together ya UniqueConstraint lagao

2. View level safe save
Attendance.objects.create(...) ki jagah update_or_create(...) use karo

Ye dono saath me best hain.

1) attendance/models.py ka fixed code
Agar tumhara model something like student, subject, date, status use karta hai, to final code aisa rakho:

from django.db import models
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject


class Attendance(models.Model):
    STATUS_CHOICES = (
        ('Present', 'Present'),
        ('Absent', 'Absent'),
    )

    student = models.ForeignKey(Student, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    date = models.DateField()
    status = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=STATUS_CHOICES)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=['student', 'subject', 'date'],
                name='unique_attendance_per_student_subject_date'
            )
        ]
        ordering = ['-date', 'student__name']

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.student.name} - {self.subject.name} - {self.date} - {self.status}"
2) Agar tum old style use karna chahte ho
Alternative:

class Meta:
    unique_together = ('student', 'subject', 'date')
But better modern way is UniqueConstraint.

3) mark_class_attendance() ko fix karo
Abhi agar tumhara code aisa hai:

Attendance.objects.create(
    student=student,
    subject=subject,
    date=date,
    status=status
)
to ise replace karo:

Attendance.objects.update_or_create(
    student=student,
    subject=subject,
    date=date,
    defaults={
        'status': status
    }
)
Full example view logic
attendance/views.py
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from core.decorators import role_required

from .models import Attendance
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def mark_class_attendance(request, subject_id):
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, id=subject_id)
    students = Student.objects.filter(course=subject.course).order_by('name')

    if request.method == 'POST':
        attendance_date = request.POST.get('date')

        for student in students:
            status = request.POST.get(f'attendance_{student.id}')
            if status:
                Attendance.objects.update_or_create(
                    student=student,
                    subject=subject,
                    date=attendance_date,
                    defaults={'status': status}
                )

        messages.success(request, "Attendance saved successfully.")
        return redirect('attendance_list')

    return render(request, 'attendance/mark_attendance.html', {
        'subject': subject,
        'students': students,
    })
update_or_create() ka fayda
Agar same record already hai:

naya duplicate nahi banega

existing record update ho jayega

Example:

pehle Present mark kiya

baad me same din faculty ne change karke Absent kiya

to:

duplicate row nahi बनेगी

wahi row update ho jayegi

Ye exactly ERP behavior hai.

4) Form level validation bhi add kar sakte ho
Agar individual attendance form hai, to clean() me bhi check lag sakta hai.

Example:

from django import forms
from .models import Attendance


class AttendanceForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Attendance
        fields = '__all__'

    def clean(self):
        cleaned_data = super().clean()
        student = cleaned_data.get('student')
        subject = cleaned_data.get('subject')
        date = cleaned_data.get('date')

        if student and subject and date:
            qs = Attendance.objects.filter(
                student=student,
                subject=subject,
                date=date
            )

            if self.instance.pk:
                qs = qs.exclude(pk=self.instance.pk)

            if qs.exists():
                raise forms.ValidationError(
                    "Attendance for this student, subject, and date already exists."
                )

        return cleaned_data
Ye optional hai, but achha hai.

5) Migration chalao
Model change ke baad:

python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate
6) Important warning
Agar database me already duplicates pade hue hain, to migration fail bhi ho sakti hai because unique constraint add karte waqt duplicate rows mil jayengi.

Pehle duplicates check karo
Shell me:

python manage.py shell
from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

print(list(dupes))
Agar output empty hai:

[]
to safe ho.

7) Agar duplicates already hain to cleanup
Example cleanup script:

from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

for dup in dupes:
    records = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student_id=dup['student'],
        subject_id=dup['subject'],
        date=dup['date']
    ).order_by('id')

    keep = records.first()
    records.exclude(id=keep.id).delete()

print("duplicates cleaned")
Phir migrate chalao.

Final recommendation
Attendance module ke liye ye 3 things mandatory karo:

UniqueConstraint(student, subject, date)

update_or_create() in mark_class_attendance()

existing duplicates cleanup before migration if needed

Best final answer
Haan, ye dangerous bug hai aur isko immediately fix karna chahiye.
ERP ke liye safest pattern:

models.UniqueConstraint(fields=['student', 'subject', 'date'], ...)
and

Attendance.objects.update_or_create(...)
Agar chaho, next message me main tumhare current attendance/models.py aur attendance/views.py ke hisaab se exact full corrected code de deta hoon.


from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject
from .models import Attendance
from .forms import AttendanceForm


def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.all().order_by("-date", "id")

    student = request.GET.get("student")
    subject = request.GET.get("subject")
    date = request.GET.get("date")

    if student:
        attendances = attendances.filter(student__id=student)

    if subject:
        attendances = attendances.filter(subject__id=subject)

    if date:
        attendances = attendances.filter(date=date)

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {"attendances": attendances})


def add_attendance(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance added successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm()

    return render(request, "attendance/add_attendance.html", {"form": form})


def edit_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST, instance=attendance)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance updated successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm(instance=attendance)

    return render(request, "attendance/edit_attendance.html", {"form": form})


def delete_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        attendance.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Attendance deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/delete_attendance.html", {"attendance": attendance})


def attendance_profile(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_profile.html", {"attendance": attendance})


def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)


def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)

def mark_class_attendance(request):
    students = Student.objects.all().order_by("id")
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("id")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_id = request.POST.get("subject")
        date = request.POST.get("date")

        subject = Subject.objects.get(id=subject_id)

        for student in students:
            status = request.POST.get(f"status_{student.id}")

            if status:
                Attendance.objects.create(
                    student=student,
                    subject=subject,
                    date=date,
                    status=status
                )

        messages.success(request, "Class attendance marked successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/mark_class_attendance.html", {
        "students": students,
        "subjects": subjects,
    })

def student_attendance_report(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all()

    overall_total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    overall_present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if overall_total > 0:
        overall_percentage = (overall_present / overall_total) * 100

    subject_reports = []

    for subject in subjects:
        total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
        present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

        percentage = 0
        if total > 0:
            percentage = (present / total) * 100

        if total > 0:
            subject_reports.append({
                "subject": subject,
                "total": total,
                "present": present,
                "percentage": percentage,
            })

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "overall_total": overall_total,
        "overall_present": overall_present,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
        "subject_reports": subject_reports,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_report.html", context)


def attendance_dashboard(request):
    total_records = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_present = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Present").count()
    total_absent = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Absent").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if total_records > 0:
        overall_percentage = (total_present / total_records) * 100

    context = {
        "total_records": total_records,
        "total_present": total_present,
        "total_absent": total_absent,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_dashboard.html", context) ye mera attendance views.py h ab isme kya change krna h bo batao full code m or isske aage jo step h unka bhi full code 

Bilkul — ab tumhare current attendance/views.py ke hisaab se full safe corrected code de raha hoon, jisse:

duplicate attendance records nahi banenge

same student + subject + date par new row create nahi hogi

existing row update ho jayegi

faculty/admin hi attendance manage karenge

student sirf report/percentage dekh sakega

attendance module ERP-standard ban jayega

Main tumhe 4 cheezein de raha hoon:

attendance/models.py

attendance/forms.py

attendance/views.py

migrate aur duplicate-cleanup steps

1) attendance/models.py
Isme UniqueConstraint laga rahe hain.

from django.db import models
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject


class Attendance(models.Model):
    STATUS_CHOICES = (
        ('Present', 'Present'),
        ('Absent', 'Absent'),
    )

    student = models.ForeignKey(Student, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    date = models.DateField()
    status = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=STATUS_CHOICES)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=['student', 'subject', 'date'],
                name='unique_attendance_per_student_subject_date'
            )
        ]
        ordering = ['-date', 'student__name']

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.student.name} - {self.subject.name} - {self.date} - {self.status}"
2) attendance/forms.py
Isme validation bhi add kar rahe hain, taaki individual add/edit form se bhi duplicate na bane.

from django import forms
from .models import Attendance


class AttendanceForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Attendance
        fields = '__all__'
        widgets = {
            'student': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'subject': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'date': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
            'status': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
        }

    def clean(self):
        cleaned_data = super().clean()
        student = cleaned_data.get('student')
        subject = cleaned_data.get('subject')
        date = cleaned_data.get('date')

        if student and subject and date:
            qs = Attendance.objects.filter(
                student=student,
                subject=subject,
                date=date
            )

            if self.instance.pk:
                qs = qs.exclude(pk=self.instance.pk)

            if qs.exists():
                raise forms.ValidationError(
                    "Attendance for this student, subject, and date already exists."
                )

        return cleaned_data
3) attendance/views.py
Ye full corrected version hai.

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject
from .models import Attendance
from .forms import AttendanceForm
from core.decorators import role_required


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.select_related('student', 'subject').all().order_by("-date", "id")

    student = request.GET.get("student")
    subject = request.GET.get("subject")
    date = request.GET.get("date")

    if student:
        attendances = attendances.filter(student__id=student)

    if subject:
        attendances = attendances.filter(subject__id=subject)

    if date:
        attendances = attendances.filter(date=date)

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {
        "attendances": attendances
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_attendance(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance added successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm()

    return render(request, "attendance/add_attendance.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST, instance=attendance)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance updated successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm(instance=attendance)

    return render(request, "attendance/edit_attendance.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        attendance.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Attendance deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/delete_attendance.html", {"attendance": attendance})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_profile(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance.objects.select_related('student', 'subject'), pk=pk)
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_profile.html", {"attendance": attendance})


@login_required
def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    # Student sirf apna dekh sake
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)


@login_required
def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    # Student sirf apna dekh sake
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def mark_class_attendance(request):
    students = Student.objects.all().order_by("id")
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("id")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_id = request.POST.get("subject")
        date = request.POST.get("date")

        if not subject_id or not date:
            messages.error(request, "Subject and date are required.")
            return redirect("mark_class_attendance")

        subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, id=subject_id)

        for student in students:
            status = request.POST.get(f"status_{student.id}")

            if status:
                Attendance.objects.update_or_create(
                    student=student,
                    subject=subject,
                    date=date,
                    defaults={
                        "status": status
                    }
                )

        messages.success(request, "Class attendance marked successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/mark_class_attendance.html", {
        "students": students,
        "subjects": subjects,
    })


@login_required
def student_attendance_report(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all()

    # Student sirf apna dekh sake
    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    overall_total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    overall_present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if overall_total > 0:
        overall_percentage = (overall_present / overall_total) * 100

    subject_reports = []

    for subject in subjects:
        total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
        present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

        percentage = 0
        if total > 0:
            percentage = (present / total) * 100

        if total > 0:
            subject_reports.append({
                "subject": subject,
                "total": total,
                "present": present,
                "percentage": percentage,
            })

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "overall_total": overall_total,
        "overall_present": overall_present,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
        "subject_reports": subject_reports,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_report.html", context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_dashboard(request):
    total_records = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_present = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Present").count()
    total_absent = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Absent").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if total_records > 0:
        overall_percentage = (total_present / total_records) * 100

    context = {
        "total_records": total_records,
        "total_present": total_present,
        "total_absent": total_absent,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_dashboard.html", context)

6) Duplicate cleanup script
python manage.py shell
from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

for dup in dupes:
    records = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student_id=dup['student'],
        subject_id=dup['subject'],
        date=dup['date']
    ).order_by('id')

    keep = records.first()
    records.exclude(id=keep.id).delete()

print("duplicates cleaned")

7) Recommended attendance/urls.py
Agar chaho to ye bhi final clean version rakho:

from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('', views.attendance_dashboard, name='attendance_dashboard'),
    path('list/', views.attendance_list, name='attendance_list'),
    path('add/', views.add_attendance, name='add_attendance'),
    path('edit/<int:pk>/', views.edit_attendance, name='edit_attendance'),
    path('delete/<int:pk>/', views.delete_attendance, name='delete_attendance'),
    path('profile/<int:pk>/', views.attendance_profile, name='attendance_profile'),
    path('mark-class/', views.mark_class_attendance, name='mark_class_attendance'),
    path('student/<int:student_id>/percentage/', views.student_attendance_percentage, name='student_attendance_percentage'),
    path('student/<int:student_id>/subject/<int:subject_id>/percentage/', views.subject_attendance_percentage, name='subject_attendance_percentage'),
    path('student/<int:student_id>/report/', views.student_attendance_report, name='student_attendance_report'),
]
8) Final result
After this:

same student + same subject + same date duplicate nahi banega

faculty same date attendance dubara mark kare to row update hogi

reports accurate rahenge

student sirf apni attendance dekh sakega

attendance module proper ERP standard ho jayega

Agar chaho, next message me main attendance templates me jahan buttons hide/show aur student/faculty restrictions lagani hain, unka bhi full code de deta hoon.

ImportError: cannot import name 'Attendance' from partially initialized module 'attendance.models' (most likely due to a circular import) (C:\Users\lenovo\collage_erp\attendance\models.py)
(venv) PS C:\Users\lenovo\collage_erp>  

Issue clear hai:

Root cause
attendance/models.py ke andar galti se ye line aa gayi hai:

from .models import Attendance
Ye circular import create kar rahi hai, kyunki models.py khud ko hi import kar raha hai.

Isliye error aa raha hai:

ImportError: cannot import name 'Attendance' from partially initialized module 'attendance.models'
Ab kya karna hai
1) attendance/models.py ko full exact code se replace karo
from django.db import models
from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject


class Attendance(models.Model):
    STATUS_CHOICES = (
        ('Present', 'Present'),
        ('Absent', 'Absent'),
    )

    student = models.ForeignKey(Student, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    subject = models.ForeignKey(Subject, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
    date = models.DateField()
    status = models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=STATUS_CHOICES)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=['student', 'subject', 'date'],
                name='unique_attendance_per_student_subject_date'
            )
        ]
        ordering = ['-date', 'student__name']

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.student.name} - {self.subject.name} - {self.date} - {self.status}"
Important
attendance/models.py me ye line bilkul nahi honi chahiye:

from .models import Attendance
2) attendance/forms.py ka full correct code
from django import forms
from .models import Attendance


class AttendanceForm(forms.ModelForm):
    class Meta:
        model = Attendance
        fields = '__all__'
        widgets = {
            'student': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'subject': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
            'date': forms.DateInput(attrs={'type': 'date', 'class': 'form-control'}),
            'status': forms.Select(attrs={'class': 'form-select'}),
        }

    def clean(self):
        cleaned_data = super().clean()
        student = cleaned_data.get('student')
        subject = cleaned_data.get('subject')
        date = cleaned_data.get('date')

        if student and subject and date:
            qs = Attendance.objects.filter(
                student=student,
                subject=subject,
                date=date
            )

            if self.instance.pk:
                qs = qs.exclude(pk=self.instance.pk)

            if qs.exists():
                raise forms.ValidationError(
                    "Attendance for this student, subject, and date already exists."
                )

        return cleaned_data
3) attendance/views.py ka full correct code
Ye wahi safe version hai jo duplicate records ko roke:

from django.shortcuts import render, redirect, get_object_or_404
from django.contrib import messages
from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required

from students.models import Student
from subjects.models import Subject
from .models import Attendance
from .forms import AttendanceForm
from core.decorators import role_required


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_list(request):
    attendances = Attendance.objects.select_related('student', 'subject').all().order_by("-date", "id")

    student = request.GET.get("student")
    subject = request.GET.get("subject")
    date = request.GET.get("date")

    if student:
        attendances = attendances.filter(student__id=student)

    if subject:
        attendances = attendances.filter(subject__id=subject)

    if date:
        attendances = attendances.filter(date=date)

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_list.html", {
        "attendances": attendances
    })


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def add_attendance(request):
    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance added successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm()

    return render(request, "attendance/add_attendance.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def edit_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        form = AttendanceForm(request.POST, instance=attendance)
        if form.is_valid():
            form.save()
            messages.success(request, "Attendance updated successfully.")
            return redirect("attendance_list")
    else:
        form = AttendanceForm(instance=attendance)

    return render(request, "attendance/edit_attendance.html", {"form": form})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def delete_attendance(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance, pk=pk)

    if request.method == "POST":
        attendance.delete()
        messages.success(request, "Attendance deleted successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/delete_attendance.html", {"attendance": attendance})


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_profile(request, pk):
    attendance = get_object_or_404(Attendance.objects.select_related('student', 'subject'), pk=pk)
    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_profile.html", {"attendance": attendance})


@login_required
def student_attendance_percentage(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_percentage.html", context)


@login_required
def subject_attendance_percentage(request, student_id, subject_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, pk=subject_id)

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    total_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
    present_classes = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

    percentage = 0
    if total_classes > 0:
        percentage = (present_classes / total_classes) * 100

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "subject": subject,
        "total_classes": total_classes,
        "present_classes": present_classes,
        "percentage": percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/subject_attendance_percentage.html", context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def mark_class_attendance(request):
    students = Student.objects.all().order_by("id")
    subjects = Subject.objects.all().order_by("id")

    if request.method == "POST":
        subject_id = request.POST.get("subject")
        date = request.POST.get("date")

        if not subject_id or not date:
            messages.error(request, "Subject and date are required.")
            return redirect("mark_class_attendance")

        subject = get_object_or_404(Subject, id=subject_id)

        for student in students:
            status = request.POST.get(f"status_{student.id}")

            if status:
                Attendance.objects.update_or_create(
                    student=student,
                    subject=subject,
                    date=date,
                    defaults={
                        "status": status
                    }
                )

        messages.success(request, "Class attendance marked successfully.")
        return redirect("attendance_list")

    return render(request, "attendance/mark_class_attendance.html", {
        "students": students,
        "subjects": subjects,
    })


@login_required
def student_attendance_report(request, student_id):
    student = get_object_or_404(Student, pk=student_id)
    subjects = Subject.objects.all()

    if getattr(request.user, 'role', None) == 'student' and not request.user.is_superuser:
        if student.user != request.user:
            return render(request, 'core/forbidden.html', status=403)

    overall_total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student).count()
    overall_present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, status="Present").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if overall_total > 0:
        overall_percentage = (overall_present / overall_total) * 100

    subject_reports = []

    for subject in subjects:
        total = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject).count()
        present = Attendance.objects.filter(student=student, subject=subject, status="Present").count()

        percentage = 0
        if total > 0:
            percentage = (present / total) * 100

        if total > 0:
            subject_reports.append({
                "subject": subject,
                "total": total,
                "present": present,
                "percentage": percentage,
            })

    context = {
        "student": student,
        "overall_total": overall_total,
        "overall_present": overall_present,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
        "subject_reports": subject_reports,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/student_attendance_report.html", context)


@login_required
@role_required(['faculty'])
def attendance_dashboard(request):
    total_records = Attendance.objects.count()
    total_present = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Present").count()
    total_absent = Attendance.objects.filter(status="Absent").count()

    overall_percentage = 0
    if total_records > 0:
        overall_percentage = (total_present / total_records) * 100

    context = {
        "total_records": total_records,
        "total_present": total_present,
        "total_absent": total_absent,
        "overall_percentage": overall_percentage,
    }

    return render(request, "attendance/attendance_dashboard.html", context)

from attendance.models import Attendance

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

Duplicate cleanup:
from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

for dup in dupes:
    records = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student_id=dup['student'],
        subject_id=dup['subject'],
        date=dup['date']
    ).order_by('id')

    keep = records.first()
    records.exclude(id=keep.id).delete()

print("duplicates cleaned")

from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student', 'subject', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

        student_id=dup['student'],
        subject_id=dup['subject'],

(venv) PS C:\Users\lenovo\collage_erp>  

Ye error confirm karta hai ki attendance duplicates abhi bhi database me present hain:

UNIQUE constraint failed:
student_id, subject_id, date
Matlab migration sahi hai, problem data me hai.

Aur haan — pehle shell me cleanup actual me run nahi hua tha because IndentationError aa gaya tha.

Ab exact fix
Step 1: shell kholo
python manage.py shell
Step 2: ye poora block ek saath paste karo
Isse duplicates delete honge, sirf first record bachega:

from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student_id', 'subject_id', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

for dup in dupes:
    records = Attendance.objects.filter(
        student_id=dup['student_id'],
        subject_id=dup['subject_id'],
        date=dup['date']
    ).order_by('id')
    keep = records.first()
    deleted_count, _ = records.exclude(id=keep.id).delete()
    print("Kept:", keep.id, "Deleted:", deleted_count, "For:", dup)

print("Duplicate cleanup done.")
Step 3: verify karo
Phir ye chalao:

from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

dupes = (
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student_id', 'subject_id', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
)

print(list(dupes))
Expected output:

[]
Step 4: null subject bhi check karo
Ye bhi chalao:

from attendance.models import Attendance
print("Null subject rows:", Attendance.objects.filter(subject__isnull=True).count())
Agar 0 aaye to thik hai.
Agar 0 se zyada aaye, to unko delete karo:

Attendance.objects.filter(subject__isnull=True).delete()
print("Null subject rows deleted.")
Step 5: shell se bahar aao
exit()
Step 6: migrate dubara chalao
python manage.py migrate
makemigrations dobara zaroori nahi hona chahiye, kyunki migration file ban chuki hai.

Kya hua tha
accounts.0003 apply ho gaya ✅

attendance.0003 duplicate rows ki wajah se fail hua ❌

ab data clean karke python manage.py migrate chalaoge to attendance migration apply ho jayegi

Agar phir bhi fail ho
Phir shell me ye bhejna:

from attendance.models import Attendance
from django.db.models import Count

print(list(
    Attendance.objects
    .values('student_id', 'subject_id', 'date')
    .annotate(c=Count('id'))
    .filter(c__gt=1)
))
print("Null subject rows:", Attendance.objects.filter(subject__isnull=True).count())
Us output se exact next fix dunga.

Ab kya fix ho gaya
Ab attendance module me:

same student + subject + date ka duplicate record nahi banega

mark_class_attendance() duplicate create nahi karega

existing row update ho jayegi

attendance reports ab reliable hongi

1) templates/attendance/attendance_dashboard.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Attendance Dashboard{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Attendance Dashboard{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row g-4">
    <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="stat-card">
            <h6>Total Records</h6>
            <h2 class="text-primary">{{ total_records }}</h2>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="stat-card">
            <h6>Total Present</h6>
            <h2 class="text-success">{{ total_present }}</h2>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="stat-card">
            <h6>Total Absent</h6>
            <h2 class="text-danger">{{ total_absent }}</h2>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="stat-card">
            <h6>Overall Percentage</h6>
            <h2 class="text-info">{{ overall_percentage|floatformat:2 }}%</h2>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
<div class="page-card mt-4">
    <h5 class="mb-3">Quick Actions</h5>
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
        <a href="{% url 'attendance_list' %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Attendance List</a>
        <a href="{% url 'add_attendance' %}" class="btn btn-outline-success">Add Attendance</a>
        <a href="{% url 'mark_class_attendance' %}" class="btn btn-outline-dark">Mark Class Attendance</a>
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
2) templates/attendance/attendance_list.html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Attendance List{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Attendance List{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
        <h2 class="mb-0">Attendance List</h2>

        {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
            <a href="{% url 'add_attendance' %}" class="btn btn-primary">Add Attendance</a>
            <a href="{% url 'mark_class_attendance' %}" class="btn btn-dark">Mark Class Attendance</a>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
    <form method="get" class="row g-3 mb-4">
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <input type="text" name="student" class="form-control" placeholder="Filter by Student ID" value="{{ request.GET.student }}">
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-4">
            <input type="text" name="subject" class="form-control" placeholder="Filter by Subject ID" value="{{ request.GET.subject }}">
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-3">
            <input type="date" name="date" class="form-control" value="{{ request.GET.date }}">
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-1">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-dark w-100">Go</button>
        </div>
    </form>
    {% endif %}

    <div class="table-responsive">
        <table class="table table-bordered table-striped align-middle">
            <thead class="table-dark">
                <tr>
                    <th>ID</th>
                    <th>Student</th>
                    <th>Subject</th>
                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Profile</th>
                    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    {% endif %}
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for attendance in attendances %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ attendance.id }}</td>
                    <td>{{ attendance.student.name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ attendance.subject.name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ attendance.date }}</td>
                    <td>
                        {% if attendance.status == "Present" %}
                            <span class="badge bg-success">{{ attendance.status }}</span>
                        {% else %}
                            <span class="badge bg-danger">{{ attendance.status }}</span>
                        {% endif %}
                    </td>
                    <td>
                        <a href="{% url 'attendance_profile' attendance.id %}" class="btn btn-info btn-sm">View</a>
                    </td>

                    {% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}
                    <td>
                        <a href="{% url 'edit_attendance' attendance.id %}" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm">Edit</a>
                        <a href="{% url 'delete_attendance' attendance.id %}" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</a>
                    </td>
                    {% endif %}
                </tr>
                {% empty %}
                <tr>
                    <td colspan="{% if request.user.is_superuser or request.user.role == 'faculty' %}7{% else %}6{% endif %}" class="text-center">
                        No attendance records found.
                    </td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

                        <option value="{{ subject.id }}">{{ subject.name }}</option>
                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="col-md-6">
                <label class="form-label">Date</label>
                <input type="date" name="date" class="form-control" required>
            </div>
        </div>

                    <tr>
                        <th>Student ID</th>
                        <th>Name</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for student in students %}
                    <tr>
                        <td>{{ student.id }}</td>
                        <td>{{ student.name }}</td>
                        <td>
                            <select name="status_{% raw %}{{ student.id }}{% endraw %}" class="form-select">
                                <option value="">Select</option>
                                <option value="Present">Present</option>
                                <option value="Absent">Absent</option>
                            </select>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}

                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <a href="/dashboard/" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
</div>
{% endblock %}
Important note
mark_class_attendance.html me maine ye line diya:

<select name="status_{% raw %}{{ student.id }}{% endraw %}" class="form-select">
Isko actual template file me raw tags ke bina aise likhna hai:

<select name="status_{{ student.id }}" class="form-select">
Main yahan formatting conflict se bachne ke liye highlight kar raha hoon.

Ab next best step
Ab attendance module ka:

backend safe ho gaya

duplicates fix ho gaye

templates polished ho gaye

Ab next kaam hona chahiye:

export reports (PDF/Excel)

Ye project ko next level le jayega.

Agar chaho, next message me main Student List + Attendance + Result + Fee export ka roadmap aur full code start kar deta hoon.

Issue simple hai: mark_class_attendance.html me abhi bhi {% raw %} pada hua hai. Django me ye tag by default nahi hota, isliye error aa raha hai.

Sirf ye file replace karo
attendance/templates/attendance/mark_class_attendance.html

{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}Mark Class Attendance{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}Mark Class Attendance{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="page-card">
    <h3 class="mb-4">Mark Class Attendance</h3>

    <form method="post">
        {% csrf_token %}

        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <label class="form-label">Subject</label>
                <select name="subject" class="form-select" required>
                    <option value="">Select Subject</option>
                    {% for subject in subjects %}
                        <option value="{{ subject.id }}">{{ subject.name }}</option>
                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="col-md-6">
                <label class="form-label">Date</label>
                <input type="date" name="date" class="form-control" required>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-bordered align-middle">
                <thead class="table-dark">
                    <tr>
                        <th>Student ID</th>
                        <th>Name</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for student in students %}
                    <tr>
                        <td>{{ student.id }}</td>
                        <td>{{ student.name }}</td>
                        <td>
                            <select name="status_{{ student.id }}" class="form-select">
                                <option value="">Select</option>
                                <option value="Present">Present</option>
                                <option value="Absent">Absent</option>
                            </select>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% empty %}
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="3" class="text-center">No students found.</td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <div class="mt-3">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">Save Attendance</button>
            <a href="{% url 'attendance_list' %}" class="btn btn-secondary">Back</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
{% endblock %}
Kya galti thi
Ye line galat thi:

<select name="status_{% raw %}{{ student.id }}{% endraw %}" class="form-select">
Sahi line ye hai:

<select name="status_{{ student.id }}" class="form-select">
Ab kya karo
File save karo, page refresh karo, phir:

/attendance/mark-class/ open karo

attendance mark karke save test karo

Agar chaho, agla step me main attendance ke remaining templates ko ek baar role-based final polish ke saath verify kara deta hoon.


mujhe issi project ko aage continue krna h issi data k saath lekin dusre search  option m tumhare gpt k kyoki m yaha jb bhi search krta hu yha crome not respond aata h or data bahut late aata h ye page hang sa lgta h 


Thought for 14s
Haan, continue kar sakte ho, lekin dusre chat/search mode me same full context automatically guaranteed nahi hota.

Best tareeka ye hai:

Sabse safe option
Isi chat/project me kaam continue karo.
Kyuki yahin:

tumhara project context

errors

modules

fixes

structure
sab linked hai.

Agar dusre GPT/search option me jana hi hai
To wahan start me ek project handoff summary paste kar dena.
Tab main wahan se bhi same project continue kara dunga.

Main tumhare liye abhi ek ready-to-paste summary de raha hoon.

Copy-paste project handoff summary
Main Django-based College ERP project bana raha hoon.

Current project status:

1. Auth + roles
- CustomUser model use ho raha hai
- roles: admin, faculty, student
- login/logout working
- student/faculty role-based sidebar and permissions applied

2. Students module
- add/edit/delete/list/profile complete
- student photo upload working
- student self-profile restriction added
- my-profile route needed/used for student panel

3. Faculty module
- add/edit/delete/list/profile complete
- faculty photo upload working
- assign subjects working

4. Courses, Subjects, Departments
- basic CRUD/list working

5. Exams + Results
- exams CRUD working
- results CRUD working
- student result card working
- student should only see own results
- faculty/admin can manage all

6. Finance
- fee CRUD working
- student should only see own fee records
- faculty/admin can manage all

7. Attendance
- attendance CRUD working
- duplicate protection added using unique constraint on student + subject + date
